title: Dynamic Shopify Designer Sales Associate
desc:

## What We're Looking For

* Strong sales, negotiation, and relationship-building abilities.

* Confidence speaking with founders, CEOs, and ecommerce business owners.
* Self-motivated, disciplined, and results-driven.
* Ability to independently source, nurture, and close premium clients.

Experience selling Shopify

title: Android APK Showing Preoutcome
desc:
I need a lightweight Android application that I can run from my local machine (localhost / emulator) and export as an APK. Its core purpose is simple: display a “preoutcome” value to the user before any further action is taken. I will handle the back-end logic that generates this value; you will focus on the Android front end, the connection to my localhost endpoint, and the clean presentation of the result.

Please build with standard Android tools (Android Studio, Kotlin or Java—your choice) so I can open, tweak, and re-build the project easily. Keep the interface minimal yet clear: a single screen that fetches the data from http://localhost or 10.0.2.2 (for emulator), shows a loading state, then renders the preoutcome. No additional features such as in-app purchases or notifications are needed.

Deliverables:
• Full Android Studio project with well-commented code  
• Installable debug APK that I can sideload on a device or emulator  
• Brief README explaining how to point the app to my local server and re-compile

Acceptance criteria: launching the APK on an emulator that is serving my endpoint locally should fetch and visibly display the preoutcome without crashes, errors, or network permission issues (remember to add INTERNET permission in the manifest).

If this fits your skillset, I look forward to seeing how quickly you can stand up the interface and wire in the data call.

title: Carousel Parking Solution Presentation
desc:
I’m putting together a comprehensive Google Slides deck that lays out the acute car-parking crunch faced by Shimla and positions a carousel-based system as a commercially viable, socially responsible answer. The story arc must move smoothly from problem statement to business model to stakeholder impact so the deck can be shown to municipal officials, hotel associations, resident-welfare groups, and potential investors.

Please structure the slides so they cover:

• A data-backed snapshot of today’s parking shortage in Shimla’s core, colonies, tourist belts, and government precincts  
• Technical overview of carousel parking—capacity gains, footprint reduction on hilly terrain, local manufacturing potential, and required utilities  
• Financial model: capex, opex, projected parking-fee revenue, payback period, and milestone-based cash-flow tables  
• Societal dividends: blue-collar job creation, hotel and retail spill-over, decongestion, emission cuts, and empowerment of local fabrication units  
• Comparative case studies or proofs you delivered in China or Europe, with notes on tailoring the concept for Indian regulatory and labour conditions  
• Call-to-action slide for government and private-sector partners, summarising next steps

Visual polish matters: concise copy, clear infographics, and region-specific photos or renders that resonate with hill-city stakeholders.

When you respond, briefly point me to carousel or smart-parking presentations you produced for Chinese or

title: Custom Apron Ecommerce Marketing
desc:
I sell premium, fully-customizable aprons online at a $55 price point and need a digital marketer who can turn social channels into a steady sales engine. The audience is U.S. home cooks and bakers aged 25-55, so every tactic must resonate with food-loving consumers who value both style and function.

What I need you to take ownership of
• A clear, data-driven strategy for Facebook, Instagram, and Pinterest that is built to convert—paid ads, boosted posts, remarketing, and look-alike audiences included.  
• Engaging content that mixes recipe ideas and cooking tips, real customer testimonials, and behind-the-scenes glimpses of the apron-making process, all mapped out in a content calendar.  
• On-page and off-page SEO tweaks that support the campaign and reinforce search visibility for customizable aprons.  
• Continuous A/B testing and daily optimization to hit aggressive ROAS and CPA targets, with weekly reporting so I can see exactly how spend translates to sales.

Compensation is flexible—hourly or performance-based. What matters most is proof you’ve scaled ecommerce brands before. When you apply, please link to at least two case studies that show revenue growth you personally drove, and outline the tools you used (Ads Manager, Google Analytics, Klaviyo, etc.). 

If you’re confident you can move products at volume and have the portfolio to prove it, I’d love to see how you’d approach the first 90 days.

title: Business Workflow Automation Specialist Needed
desc:
I’m searching for a reliable partner who can step straight into my client projects and turn real-world business processes into rock-solid automations. Workflow automation is the main focus, so you’ll spend most of your time analysing existing procedures, spotting bottlenecks and then stitching together streamlined, rules-based flows that work inside the tools my clients already know.

Day-to-day you will be:

• Talking directly with stakeholders to map their current process in plain language  
• Designing, building and testing automations that connect the following in particular:  
  – Project management tools  
  – Email systems  
  – Our existing automation tools / scripts  
• Documenting each step clearly so a non-technical manager can follow the logic  
• Providing short, regular progress updates and jumping on quick calls when clarification is needed

Technical fluency with APIs, databases, dashboard frameworks and AI utilities is essential because many of our solutions blend data syncing, approvals, reporting and AI-assisted decision points.

To help me gauge fit quickly, please include past work that shows:  
• A before-and-after snapshot of a workflow you automated  
• The stack you used and why  
• Results in measurable terms (time saved, error reduction, etc.)

I handle all client communications, but you must be comfortable joining discovery calls as the technical expert. If this first project runs smoothly there’s plenty more in the queue, so think of it as the sta

title: Expert GenAI Live Trainer Wanted
desc:
I’m expanding the TechTutorialz instructor team and need an expert who can deliver engaging live online sessions on Generative AI, AI Testing, and Prompt Engineering. My learners are mostly software professionals looking to deepen their practical skills, so I’m after someone who can move well beyond theory, demonstrate real-world workflows, and handle advanced Q&A on the spot.

Here’s what I have in mind: a series of live, interactive classes (Zoom or similar) where you guide students through hands-on projects—building and fine-tuning GenAI models, designing robust AI test strategies, and crafting effective prompts for LLMs. Each session should close with a mini-assignment and feedback loop so attendees can apply concepts immediately. Slide decks, code notebooks, datasets, and recorded replays will all form part of the final hand-over package.

If you thrive on explaining cutting-edge AI concepts, can share production-level tips, and enjoy the energy of real-time teaching, let’s talk about dates, curriculum flow, and the number of cohorts.

title: High-Volume AI Video Production
desc:
We are scaling a large-format realistic AI video pipeline and need professionals who can reliably turn out fifty finished clips every single day. Each piece must hold up to cinematic quality standards, include polished AI VFX work, and show strong AI-driven editing finesse. The assignment is ongoing; once you are on board, fresh footage will flow to you continuously.

Deliverables
• 50 fully rendered, realistic AI-generated videos per day  
• Cinematic look and feel throughout, with seamless AI VFX integration  
• Final edits exported in the resolution and codec we specify, ready for immediate distribution

Only creators based in Mumbai, Pune, or Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar (Aurangabad) can be considered because in-person collaboration matters to this workflow. When you are confident you can hit the daily quota, drop by our studio—Office No. 503 & 504, 5th Floor, Peninsula Park, A-4, Andheri West, Mumbai—for a quick discussion and test brief.

Before visiting, message me on WhatsApp (+91 90827 61432) with:
• Your name  
• Individual / company profile  
• A link to a recent portfolio that proves cinematic, AI VFX, and AI editing capabilities  
• A preferred meeting time

We are Dream House Productionz, and we look forward to partnering for the long haul with teams or solo specialists who match our speed and visual ambition.

title: Custom Vacation Activity Planner
desc:
I’m mapping out a leisure-focused road-trip vacation and already have dates, destinations, and lodging sorted. What I still need is a thoughtfully curated list of things worth doing at each stop—no full itinerary or bookings, simply the best activity recommendations that fit a relaxed holiday vibe.

Here’s what I’d like delivered:  
• 5–7 standout activities for every location on my route, balanced between must-see highlights and lesser-known gems.  
• Key details for each suggestion: brief description, estimated duration, opening hours, cost (if any), address or GPS pin, and a link for further info or ticket purchase.  
• A quick note on why each activity pairs well with self-drive travel (easy parking, scenic approach roads, flexible timing, etc.).  

Presentation can be a well-structured Google Sheet or PDF—whatever lets me scan ideas quickly while on the road. Accuracy, up-to-date info, and a bit of creative flair are the priorities; I’ll handle scheduling and reservations myself once I have your shortlist.

title: Instagram Promotion & Blog Review
desc:
I need a creative who can make my product shine on Instagram and back it up with a clear, informative blog article written in a casual, friendly voice. The Instagram leg is the priority, so I’m counting on you to plan, create, and publish content that drives curiosity, clicks, and—most importantly—conversions. Think eye-catching feed posts, short Reels, interactive Stories, and the right mix of hashtags to keep the momentum going from launch week onward.

Alongside the social push, I also want a concise, well-researched blog post that doubles as a reference point for people who want more detail. The article should read like you’re chatting with a friend—helpful, down-to-earth, yet packed with facts about key features, benefits, and real-world use cases. No fluff: readers should walk away knowing exactly why the product deserves a spot in their life.

Deliverables (minimum):  
• 2–3 Instagram feed posts with polished visuals and captions  
• 1 short Reel and 3 Story frames to amplify reach  
• 600–800-word informative blog article, SEO-ready and linked to the posts  
• A brief performance outline suggesting posting schedule, hashtags, and CTA strategy

Acceptance criteria:  
• All content must match the casual, friendly tone and be free of grammatical errors  
• Posts and article must highlight the same core features and include a clear call-to-action  
• Visuals should be high-resolution and formatted for Instagram’s latest specs  
• Blog piece delivered in editable format (G

title: Professional Minimalist Logo Design
desc:
I need a clean, minimalist logo that pairs a distinctive icon or symbol with the full company name and presents a polished, professional feel. The symbol should be simple enough to stay memorable at small sizes, but strong enough to stand on its own when the name is removed for social-media avatars or favicons.

My preference is for crisp lines, balanced negative space, and a restrained color palette—think one strong primary hue with neutrals rather than gradients or busy textures. Typography should be modern and highly legible; sans-serif options usually work best, yet I am open to an elegant humanist face if it supports a professional tone.

What I’ll look for in the final delivery:
• Primary logo: icon + wordmark on light and dark backgrounds  
• Secondary mark: icon only  
• Color and monochrome versions  
• Files in SVG, EPS, PDF, and high-res PNG

Please include a short note on the concept rationale so I see how the shape, font, and color choices reinforce the brand’s professional character.

title: Essay writing  -- 2
desc:
I have an upcoming degree assignment that requires a well-argued History essay and I’d like a skilled academic writer to guide the process from outline to final draft. The brief, grading rubric, and a shortlist of primary and secondary sources are ready; what I need now is clear structure, strong analysis, and polished academic prose.

You will develop the thesis, craft logical paragraphs backed by reputable citations, integrate evidence smoothly, and ensure the final paper is fully referenced and 100 % original. I’m happy to collaborate on ideas, but I do expect you to take the lead on writing, refining, and formatting.

Deliverables  
• Completed essay in editable .docx and PDF  
• Reference list formatted to my chosen style (Chicago preferred, but MLA is acceptable if easier for you)  
• Plagiarism check report

I’m aiming for a concise yet thorough piece (we can lock final word count together), so please share a brief sample of previous History work or similar humanities essays when you respond.

title: SolidWorks VAWT Prototype CAD Package
desc:
I need a complete 3 D CAD package for a 5 kW vertical-axis wind turbine prototype. You will be working from the PDF engineering drawing of our 5 kW / 300 RPM permanent-magnet generator, which uses a 550 mm OD flange (460 mm PCD, four anchor bolts) and a 48 mm shaft.

My priority platform is SolidWorks, so please model natively there and supply neutral formats (STEP/DXF) as well. The mounting base and tower interface should be a heavy-duty steel design; I have no weight limit, so strength and ease of local fabrication take precedence over mass savings.

Key items I expect from you:

• SolidWorks 3 D model of the complete sub-assembly: flange adapter, bearing carriers if needed, central shaft, rotor hub and any fasteners.  
• 2 D manufacturing drawings with dimensions, tolerances, weld symbols and material call-outs ready for workshop use.  
• A concise bill of materials.

Everything must align precisely with the generator’s flange and 48 mm shaft, and the drawings have to be clear enough for a local machine shop to fabricate without back-and-forth clarification. If this sounds straightforward to you, let’s get started.

title: Live-Action Product Promo Video
desc:
I need a concise, attention-grabbing promotional video that shows my product in real-world use. The focus is a clear product demonstration rather than a broad brand story, so every shot should highlight key features and benefits in a tangible setting.

Here’s what I have in mind:
• Pre-production support for concept, script, and shot list that keeps the spotlight on the product.
• A one-to-two-minute live-action shoot, captured in crisp 1080p (4K preferred), with dynamic angles and natural lighting.
• Clean editing in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve, backed by light motion graphics for titles, logo stings, and a closing call-to-action.
• Professional color grade, licensed background music, and clear voice-over or on-screen text to ensure the demo is immediately understandable.
• Two revision rounds so the final cut feels perfectly aligned with my goals.

Deliverables:
1. Master video file (MP4, H.264) in 1080p and, if possible, 4K.
2. Separate social-media-ready cut-downs (15-30 s) using the same footage.
3. All project files, audio stems, and graphic assets for future tweaks.

If you have a portfolio of live-action product demonstrations, especially those that quickly convey a product’s value, I’d love to see it. I’m ready to move fast once we align on the creative direction and timeline.

title: Lead-Generating Promo Video ASAP
desc:
A concise, engaging promotional video is needed to drive immediate leads and sales for my brand. The finished piece will live on our website and social channels, so it must grab attention within the first few seconds, communicate our key value proposition clearly, and close with a compelling call-to-action.

Scope of work
• Develop or refine the concept, keeping brand tone and target audience in mind.  
• Craft a tight script and storyboard that positions our offer as the solution to the viewer’s problem.  
• Handle full production (or motion-graphics-only if more efficient): sourcing stock, voice-over, on-screen text, and licensed music as required.  
• Edit, colour-grade, mix audio, and deliver a polished master in 1080p (H.264) plus any resized cuts for Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts.

Timeline
Speed is crucial—I need the first draft within a few days of project kickoff and the final approved version immediately after revisions.

Acceptance criteria
1. Video length around 60-90 seconds unless a shorter cut converts better.  
2. Clear on-screen CTA and end-slate with our logo and URL.  
3. All assets cleared for commercial use and provided along with the project file (Premiere Pro or After Effects).  

If you thrive under tight deadlines and know how to turn viewers into customers, this project should be a perfect fit.

title: Logo Design for Penuel
desc: I need a professional and classic logo design that represents my brand, "Penuel." The logo should balance text and symbols, showcasing a timeless and elegant style. I'm open to any color palette that complements the design concept. The key focus is on creating a high-quality and modern logo that aligns with my brand's identity. title: WhatsApp AI Investment Advisor Bot
desc:
I am building a WhatsApp-based chatbot that gives clients clear, actionable investment-strategy advice. The focus is narrow by design: the bot does not need to field general customer-support questions or process transactions at this stage; it simply listens to a user’s goals and risk tolerance and returns tailored portfolio suggestions in natural language.

What I already have  
• A verified WhatsApp Business number and Meta Cloud API access  
• Preliminary prompts that outline my investment-advice framework and compliance disclosures  

What I need from you  
• Set up the webhook, session handling, and message templates using the official WhatsApp Cloud API (or Twilio if you prefer and can justify the choice).  
• Connect the chat flow to an LLM such as OpenAI GPT-4 or a comparable on-prem model so responses sound human while remaining aligned with my predefined guidelines.  
• Pull real-time market data for stocks, bonds and broad indices—so the advice feels current—through an API like Yahoo Finance, Alpha Vantage, or a data source you recommend.  
• Implement basic guardrails: no personalized tax advice, position size caps based on configurable risk tiers, and a disclaimer appended to each recommendation.  
• Package a small dashboard (simple React or plain HTML is fine) where I can review conversation logs, tweak prompt variables, and toggle the data feeds.  
• Hand-over: documented source code (Git), setup script or Dockerfile, and a brief Loom or screen-share walkthroug

title: Python Engineers Need Not Apply. We Need an AI Pattern Hunter
desc:
We’ve already built the platform.

106,000+ football matches. 48+ million odds movements. The statistical groundwork is complete.

Now we need a different mind.

We’re looking for someone who can study graphs, price behaviour and code as a language, not just as data.

Someone who can group, deconstruct and reinterpret complex market behaviour to uncover hidden structures that conventional AI and statistical methods have missed.

You must be an exceptional AI engineer, but more importantly, an exceptional thinker.

If your instinct is to challenge assumptions, invent new ways of analysing behaviour, and see patterns that others overlook, we want to hear from you.

Skills:

* Python
* AI / Machine Learning
* Pattern Discovery
* Graph & Behaviour Analysis
* Representation Learning
* Complex Systems

We’re not hiring another programmer. We’re hiring a different way of thinking.

title: MCA Financial Statement Extraction
desc:
I want a concise, verifiable pull-out of one Indian company’s latest financial statements straight from the MCA portal. The scope is limited to the Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and Cash-Flow Statement, plus any notes in the filings that reveal subsidiaries or overseas branches. I am not looking for director or registration details, only the financial picture.

You may work directly on the MCA site, through XBRL downloads, or with any parsing tools you prefer, as long as the final data is clean and traceable back to the original AOC-4 or MGT-7 PDFs. Please return:

• A spreadsheet (Excel or Google Sheets) with each statement on a separate tab, figures properly formatted and labeled.  
• A short PDF memo summarising key numbers and listing every subsidiary / foreign branch you located, each linked to its source page.  
• The raw filings you pulled, archived in a folder for my records.

Accuracy matters more than speed—figures must match the MCA documents exactly. When you respond, include a brief example of past work where you extracted or analysed MCA or similar regulatory filings so I can gauge fit. I will supply the exact company name once we agree on terms.

title: Engaging Travel Blog Ghostwriter
desc:
I need a fresh, well-researched travel blog post ghostwritten from scratch. The article should feel like a first-hand adventure, mixing vivid storytelling with practical tips readers can act on right away. I will supply a rough outline of destinations, highlights, and key points; you will expand it into a smooth, 1,200–1,500-word narrative that is 100 % original, SEO-friendly, and ready to publish on my WordPress site.

Here’s what I expect:
• A captivating title and sub-headings that draw readers in.  
• Engaging, informative body copy that balances inspiration with actionable advice.  
• Light keyword integration for search visibility without sacrificing flow.  
• Proofread, grammatically clean text delivered in Google Docs, with all rights transferred to me upon payment.

You’re ideal for this if you’ve previously ghostwritten travel content, understand on-page SEO, and can match the friendly, wanderlust-driven voice common to top travel blogs. Please share two or three relevant samples and let me know how quickly you can turn the first draft around.

title: Python Adventure Game Development
desc:
In this adventure game, the player takes on the role of an explorer searching for a legendary 
treasure hidden in an ancient land. The player must navigate through various challenges, 
make strategic decisions, and overcome obstacles to complete their quest successfully. The 
game consists of multiple decision-based scenarios where each choice leads to a different 
outcome. Some choices will move the player closer to the treasure, while others might result 
in failure or setbacks. The player will navigate different locations—such as a dense forest and 
a mysterious cave—while making strategic choices that determine their success.

title: Penulis Deskripsi Produk Menarik
desc:
Saya membutuhkan bantuan seorang penulis konten untuk membuat deskripsi produk yang informatif sekaligus menggugah minat beli konsumen umum. Produk yang akan Anda tulis bervariasi—mulai dari barang kebutuhan sehari-hari hingga aksesori gaya hidup—namun semuanya membutuhkan gaya bahasa yang luwes, mudah dipahami, dan fokus pada manfaat nyata.

Apa yang saya perlukan:  
• Deskripsi produk yang jelas, ringkas, dan berorientasi manfaat (sekitar 100–150 kata per produk).  
• Nada ramah dan persuasif, tanpa jargon teknis yang berlebihan.  
• Struktur yang memuat judul singkat, poin keunggulan utama, dan ajakan bertindak.  
• Optimasi kata kunci ringan agar mudah ditemukan di pencarian online.  

Cara kerja:  
Saya akan mengirimkan detail produk (fitur, spesifikasi, dan foto). Anda meriset singkat, lalu menulis draf pertama. Satu kali revisi ringan sudah termasuk agar hasil akhirnya benar-benar sesuai citra brand.  

Hasil akhir yang saya harapkan adalah file teks atau dokumen Google Docs siap unggah ke toko online. Bila kolaborasi ini lancar, ada peluang penugasan rutin untuk lini produk lainnya.  

Jika Anda terbiasa menulis konten pemasaran dan memahami cara berbicara langsung kepada konsumen Indonesia, saya menantikan portofolio terbaik Anda.

title: FiveM Server Development -- 2
desc:
I'm looking for an experienced developer to fix and develop server scripts for a FiveM game panel.

- Fix existing server scripts
- Develop new functionalities as needed
-must have knowledge with coding and script functionality

Ideal Skills and Experience:
- Proficiency in Lua and FiveM scripting
- Experience with server management and game panels
- Strong problem-solving skills
- Ability to implement requested functionalities efficiently

Please provide examples of similar work done. Looking forward to your proposals!

title: 2D Animator & Video Editor for Football Documentary Channel (Wallace / Serious History Style) -- 8
desc:
I’m looking for a video editor / animator to create YouTube documentary videos in a style similar to the channels Wallace Animation and Serious History.

Reference examples:

Wallace:
https://youtu.be/tNc8OpsneVc

Serious History:
https://youtu.be/Yctn_C_6cF8

The style I’m looking for includes:

Simple 2D illustrated characters
Cutout-style animation
Character movement and expressions
Camera pans, zooms, and scene transitions
Maps, diagrams, and visual storytelling
Motion graphics where appropriate
Strong pacing and viewer retention

This is NOT a traditional documentary with stock footage.

I’m specifically looking for someone who can create videos that feel similar to Wallace Animation and Serious History using illustrated characters and simple animations.

The first project will be a 10–15 minute YouTube documentary.

The script will be provided.

Please include:

Examples of similar animation/documentary work.
Your estimated price for a 10–15 minute video.
The software you use (After Effects, Illustrator, etc.).
Whether you would be interested in long-term work if the channel grows.

To make sure you’ve read everything, start your proposal with the word “Football”.

Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: AI-Driven Video Creation Service
desc:
I handle a steady flow of client requests for videos that explain services, showcase products, power YouTube channels, and fuel UGC campaigns. To keep pace I need a dependable AI solution that can take a brief, some text or visuals, and turn it into a fully rendered video with minimal human touch. The non-negotiable is simple: true video generation through AI.

Ideal workflow  
• Type a prompt or drop in assets and receive a finished clip in standard aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1).  
• Branding options for colours, fonts, and logo placement.  
• Output that is ready to post on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, or a client’s website.

Nice-to-have extras such as text-to-speech, automated editing, or built-in voice-over integration are welcome if they speed things up, but I am open to your preferred stack—RunwayML, Pictory, Synthesia, Descript, Lumen5, or a custom pipeline with ffmpeg and Python.

Deliverables  
1. A repeatable AI video-generation setup (web, SaaS, or local script) with clear user instructions.  
2. Three demo videos: one service overview, one product demo, and one YouTube-style segment so I can show immediate proof of concept to clients.  
3. Source files or project access so I can replicate results for future briefs.

Acceptance criteria  
• Each demo matches the prompt in content and branding.  
• Final exports arrive in MP4 or MOV at 1080p minimum.  
• Turnaround for a two-minute video stays under one hour end to end.

If your solution meets these points, I can

title: SaaS ERP Education Lead Generation
desc:
I need a proven lead-generation specialist to open doors for our cloud-based ERP platform built specifically for schools, colleges, and training centres. Your focus is strictly on filling the top of the funnel—sourcing, qualifying, and booking discovery calls—so my in-house team can take the deal from there.

Scope of work

• Craft and execute multi-touch email campaigns, social-media outreach (LinkedIn, Facebook groups, relevant forums), and—where appropriate—cold calls.  
• Refine messaging to highlight pain points our SaaS solves: fee collection, attendance, timetable management, and parent engagement.  
• Track activity in our CRM, flag hot leads, and deliver concise weekly reports on opens, replies, meetings booked, and recommended next steps.

What I’m looking for from you
When you apply, show past work that proves you can generate qualified leads for a B2B SaaS or EdTech product. Screenshots, metrics, case studies, or references that back up your numbers are welcome. No lengthy proposals—evidence beats promises.

Deliverables
1. 500 clean, verified contacts matching our ICP, delivered in CSV and uploaded to our CRM.  
2. Three sequenced email templates plus social messages and call scripts.  
3. Weekly performance report (opens, replies, meetings set, insights).  
4. End-of-month summary with optimisation suggestions.

Acceptance criteria
• Min

title: Kubernetes CNI Migration & Benchmarking
desc:
My production Kubernetes cluster needs hands-on assistance migrating the networking layer from its current, rather intricate CNI to either Cilium (eBPF with WireGuard) or Calico with WireGuard encryption. The overriding goal is a seamless, zero-downtime cut-over while preserving all of our existing custom NetworkPolicies—east-west, ingress, and egress traffic must continue to behave exactly as it does today.

Scope of work  
The engagement starts with a deep-dive into the present topology, routing rules, and policy objects. From there, a step-by-step migration playbook and rollback plan must be crafted, executed first in staging, then in production. Once live, I need empirical data that compares both solutions: latency, throughput, CPU and memory overhead, and encryption overhead under real-world load.

Deliverables  
• Migration plan with clearly defined checkpoints and rollback steps  
• Fully implemented transition to either Cilium or Calico in production, no service disruption  
• Verification that every custom NetworkPolicy remains effective post-migration  
• Benchmark report (graphs and narrative) contrasting Cilium vs. Calico WireGuard on the cluster, using tools such as iperf, kube-burner, or similar, plus Prometheus/Grafana metrics exports  

Acceptance criteria  
– Cluster remains healthy and schedulable throughout the process  
– All policies validated via automated tests after cut-over  
– Benchmark demonstrates equal or improved performance versus the legacy set

title: Expert Arabic Media Buyer Required
desc:
We are looking for a professional Arabic‑speaking Media Buyer to join our existing marketing team for 1 month (test period) to launch and manage multiple paid campaigns in the UAE market. Main platforms: Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and Google Ads.

Your role in the team
Your main responsibility is to create, launch and manage campaigns on both platforms.
You will collaborate closely with our content & design team, providing them with the scripts, angles and creative direction they need to produce the copies and visuals. You brief the creative concepts; they execute the production.

You will check and ensure there are no technical issues or abnormal spending and make strategic decisions (which campaigns to scale or stop, how to allocate budget between the two platforms) are your responsibility as the Media Buyer.

Tasks
Build the media strategy for each product/service and choose the best platform and objective (sales, leads, traffic, etc.).
Create new campaigns and ad sets, choose targeting, set budgets and bidding strategies.
Provide the design team with scripts, hooks and creative angles so they can produce the right copies and visuals.
Set up and manage pixels/tags and conversion tracking accurately.
Analyze performance continuously, move budgets between Meta and Google based on data, and focus on the best performers.
Provide clear weekly reports for the team showing spend, results, ROAS/CPA and next recommendations.
Work closely every day with our marketing team, collaborat

title: Skin Care Product Review Writing
desc:
I’m putting together a series of in-depth skincare and beauty product reviews aimed at an adult audience and would like a writer who can combine science-backed insight with an honest, lived-in usage perspective. For every item I send your way, I need a balanced narrative that:  

• Breaks down the key ingredients, explaining what each one does for the skin and why it matters.  
• Describes your hands-on experience with texture, absorption, scent, packaging, and visible results over time.  
• Places the product in context by comparing it with at least one close competitor—highlighting where it excels, falls short, or offers better value.  

Each review should read naturally, run roughly 800–1,000 words, and be optimized around a primary keyword I’ll supply (nothing spammy—just thoughtful on-page SEO). A friendly yet professional tone is essential; think trusted friend who knows their hyaluronic acid from their niacinamide, not a sales brochure.  

Please cite any clinical studies or authoritative dermatology sources you reference and flag sponsored items when relevant. Final copy can be delivered in Google Docs or Word; I’ll paste it directly into WordPress, so sub-headings (H2/H3), short paragraphs, and a one-sentence meta description help me publish faster.  

If this first batch goes well, expect a steady stream of new serums, moisturizers, SPFs, and masks to evaluate. Let me know how many reviews you can comfortably turn around per week and include a short sample or link t

title: Debut Novel Structural Edit & Copyedit - A World Beyond the Horizon
desc:
My first novel is a time-travel fantasy rooted in the early Romanisation of Britain, with much of the action unfolding in ancient Wales. What I need first is a clear, concise structural overview that zeroes in on character development and their arcs. Show me where motivations wobble, growth stalls, or pay-offs feel thin; flag any scenes that undermine emotional logic or could sharpen a reveal—even brief pacing notes are welcome if they help the characters shine.

Once the bones feel sound, move straight into copy editing. The priority here is grammatical accuracy and clean punctuation while preserving my tone. Tighten sentences, smooth dialogue tags, and clear out any obvious redundancies, but please don’t sand away the narrative voice.

Because the setting brushes up against real history, I’d value light feedback on accuracy—simple flags for anachronisms or shaky context are enough. No deep dive required.

Additionally, please evaluate whether my use of present tense and shifts between omniscient narration and stream of consciousness are cohesive and serve the story effectively.

Deliverables  
• 4–5-page structural report focused on character arcs  
• Full manuscript returned with tracked-changes copy edits plus a final clean version ready for next steps  

If you’ve guided other fantasy or historical debuts, mention it and share a brief sample of your notes or edits. Turn-around time and your preferred software (Word, Google Docs, etc.) will also help me plan.

title: Diseño Conductos Climatización Local 70 m
desc:
El local que voy a climatizar tiene entre 50 m² y 100 m² y está dividido en varias estancias, por lo que necesito un plano completo de conductos para un sistema de aire acondicionado central. Busco un diseño que me permita enviar la información directamente al fabricante de conductos ISOBER sin ajustes posteriores: trayectos, secciones, curvas, piezas especiales y puntos de impulsión y retorno deben quedar perfectamente acotados.

Quiero trabajar con alguien que domine normativa española, sepa equilibrar caudales en instalaciones pequeñas y entregue un plano limpio en DWG junto con un PDF para consulta rápida. Si me facilitas además un pequeño listaje de materiales con longitudes y secciones, perfecto; así podré pedir precio al taller de inmediato.

Acepto propuestas de mejora siempre que mantengamos la compatibilidad con conductos ISOBER.

title: Eastern Nile SWAT+ Modeling
desc:
I’m building a full-basin SWAT+ setup for the Eastern Nile and want support completing the simulation and forecasting phase. The core of the assignment is to ingest and pre-process hydrological data—daily river flow, rainfall, temperature and PET—and integrate those inputs into a calibrated SWAT+ model that can reliably project runoff, streamflow and water balance under multiple climate and management scenarios.

What I already have  
• 30-arc-second DEM, preliminary sub-basins and HRUs  
• Raw gauge data from ENTRO, CHIRPS rainfall grids and NASA POWER climate series  
• Land-use and soil shapefiles (pre-processed)  

Where I need your expertise  
• Fill gaps in the hydrological series, apply bias correction and trend checks  
• Finalise watershed delineation and HRU definition in ArcSWAT+ or QSWAT+  
• Configure weather generator, reservoirs and routing reaches accurately  
• Run multi-year simulations, then generate flow duration curves and seasonal forecasts out to 2050 under selected CMIP6 ensembles  
• Document every step so the model can be reproduced and audited

Deliverables  
1. Calibrated and validated SWAT+ project folder for the full Eastern Nile domain  
2. Technical memo (≈10 pages) detailing data sources, preprocessing, calibration statistics (NSE, PBIAS, R²) and scenario assumptions  
3. Spreadsheet of cleaned hydrological input series and Python/R scripts used in preprocessing  
4. Set of forecast maps and hydrographs (PNG/GeoTIFF) summarising baseline and f

title: IEEE SD-WAN Zero Trust Paper
desc:
I have already mapped out a comprehensive framework that ties SD-WAN, SASE and Zero Trust together, along with real-world architecture diagrams and use-case data from the field. What I need now is a scholarly partner who can help me convert this material into a publication-ready IEEE conference paper.

Your main focus will be to:

• Shape a coherent narrative that aligns with IEEE structure and style.  
• Build a solid literature review highlighting current trends in SD-WAN and best-practice implementation of Zero Trust frameworks, weaving in any complementary SASE findings where they naturally strengthen the argument.  
• Refine a mixed-methods research design—qualitative insights from industry deployments paired with quantitative performance data I will supply—so the methodology section meets rigorous academic standards.  
• Ensure citations, figures and tables comply with the latest IEEE template, and polish the language for technical clarity and academic tone.

I’ll provide the raw technical content, diagrams, metrics and case studies. You’ll bring strong research-writing skills, familiarity with IEEE referencing, and the ability to synthesise complex security concepts into a structured paper that can pass peer review. Throughout the process we’ll iterate on drafts in real time, aiming for a fully formatted, conference-ready manuscript as the final deliverable.

title: Pakistani PCB Layout Specialist Needed
desc:
I need single-sided, double-sided, and full multi-layer PCB layouts created for mixed-signal work. The boards combine analog and digital circuitry and will be used across embedded control, RF, and other high-speed applications, so careful impedance control, differential-pair routing, and solid mixed-signal grounding are essential.  

Altium Designer is my main environment, yet I can seamlessly integrate files produced in Proteus, KiCAD, Eagle CAD, EasyEDA, or even Multisim, so feel free to use whichever of those platforms fits your workflow best.  

What I expect from you:  
• Complete schematic capture and net-validation  
• Fully routed PCB layout that passes DRC and is ready for fabrication  
• Gerber (or ODB++) files, drill data, and a clean BOM suitable for procurement  
• Clear documentation of stack-up, controlled-impedance traces, and any RF-critical areas  

The project is considered finished once the files produce a manufacturable board without further edits. Please share a brief note on similar mixed-signal or RF/high-speed boards you have delivered so I can see how your experience lines up with this scope.

title: Boost Twitch Views & Followers
desc:
I stream gaming content on Twitch and need a concrete push to turn casual pass-through traffic into a steady audience of real, watching humans. So far, my growth strategy has relied mainly on social-media promotion through Instagram, Twitter, and TikTok; however, the results plateaued quickly and I’m ready for a data-driven approach that goes beyond simply dropping links.

Here’s what I’m looking for:  
• A clear growth roadmap that keeps everything 100 % organic—no bots or fake accounts—so that live-view metrics and chat activity stay healthy in the long term.  
• Hands-on execution of that roadmap: setting up or refining channel panels, scheduling posts, tailoring video snippets, and tapping into relevant Twitch communities, Discord servers, or Reddit threads where gaming fans already congregate.  
• Practical advice on collaboration opportunities—raid chains, co-streams, or tournament participation—that fit my style and timezone.  
• Weekly reporting through Twitch analytics, StreamElements, or similar tools so I can see exactly how many new followers and peak concurrent viewers your efforts deliver.

I’ll consider the job a success once I see sustained increases in live viewers during at least six separate streams and a measurable uptick in genuine follower count (not just passive lurkers). If you’ve previously scaled gaming channels and can show proof, I’m all ears. Let’s make my streams pop.

title: YouTube Logo & Shorts Editing
desc:
I need a logo designer and video editor for my YouTube channel. Before bidding, watch this video and tell me what type of logo and editing style would fit the channel. Generic AI bids will be rejected.

title: Instagram Graphic Design Refresh
desc:
I’m giving my Instagram feed a facelift and need a designer who can create eye-catching social media graphics with a clean, modern aesthetic. The job focuses solely on Instagram, so every asset must be sized and optimized for that platform’s latest specs.

You’ll receive my brand colours, fonts, and core messaging; your task is to translate them into cohesive, reusable templates that keep the look sharp and contemporary.  

Deliverables

I’ll need initial concepts within three days and one revision round before final hand-off. If you excel at crafting modern visuals for Instagram, share a link to your portfolio and let’s get started.

title: Comprehensive Social Media Management
desc:
I need an experienced social media manager who can fully own our presence on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, YouTube and LinkedIn, while also coordinating posts with our ongoing SEO efforts. The role covers the entire content cycle: planning, creation, scheduling, community interaction and performance analysis.

Content mix  
You’ll be working with a blend of text updates, custom images/graphics and engaging video. I expect you to optimise each format for the strengths of every platform—square visuals and Reels for Instagram, short threads for Twitter, longer explainer clips for YouTube, and so on—always keeping consistent brand tone.

Core objectives  
1. Steady follower growth on all channels  
2. Noticeable boost in engagement (likes, comments, shares, watch time)  
3. Tangible uplift in website traffic and in-store footfall traced back to social links  

What success looks like  
• A 30-day content calendar delivered up front each month  
• Daily posting (or the optimal cadence you recommend) executed via Hootsuite, Buffer or a similar scheduler  
• Prompt replies to audience questions and comments, ideally within 24 hours  
• Weekly performance snapshot and a deeper monthly report pulled from native analytics, Google Analytics and any listening tool you prefer  

Please include recent examples where you achieved similar follower, engagement or traffic results, and mention the primary tools you use (e.g., Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, Later, Sprout Social). If you can demons

title: International Strategic Alliance Development
desc:
I need an experienced business-development professional to help me secure and nurture strategic alliances that will open doors to international markets. The goal is to identify the right organisations, approach them with a clear value proposition, and guide the relationship through to a formal partnership agreement.

Here’s what I expect:

• A concise partner landscape: who the key players are, why they matter, and how they complement our offer.  
• An outreach and engagement plan that details messaging, channels, and timelines.  
• Support during initial negotiations—drafting MoUs or term sheets and advising on win-win deal structures.  

You’ll draw on proven methods in partnership development, B2B sales psychology, and market research, but the focus stays firmly on building enduring, mutually beneficial alliances. Success is measured by the number and quality of partners secured and the tangible progress toward agreements ready for signature.

Let’s build the bridges that take us global.
