title: Chemical Engineers from PAKISTAN
desc:
I’m assembling a small team of Pakistan-based chemical engineers who work confidently in Aspen HYSYS and Aspen Plus. Your core mission is to build and refine steady-state or dynamic process models, push them through rigorous optimisation, extract clean datasets for further analysis, and then translate everything into a clear, professional technical report that a non-specialist stakeholder can still follow.

Typical assignments will include:
• Creating or updating complete Aspen HYSYS / Aspen Plus files for new and existing flowsheets  
• Running sensitivity studies and optimisation routines to improve energy use, yields, or economics  
• Generating concise mass- and energy-balance tables, convergence screenshots, and annotated flowsheets  
• Writing a polished report that explains methodology, key assumptions, model results, and recommendations

Acceptance criteria:
1. Simulation files open error-free in the stated Aspen version and converge under the documented conditions.  
2. All optimisation variables and constraints are listed and reproducible.  
3. The final report (Word or PDF) summarises objectives, methods, results, and actionable insights, with figures and tables properly labelled.

If you have a solid chemical-engineering foundation, practical experience across process, materials, or environmental applications, and can back it up with crisp technical writing, I’d like to see examples of your previous Aspen work along with a brief note on your availability.

title: Sales Call Appointment Setter Needed
desc:
UK native: I need a reliable appointment setter to secure sales-focused calls for my business. All outreach must be done by phone, and I will provide a proven script along with the contact list. Your main responsibility is to connect with each lead, follow the script naturally, handle basic objections, and lock in a confirmed time on my calendar.

You should already be comfortable making outbound sales calls, speaking clearly in English, updating call notes promptly, and meeting daily targets. If you have your own dialing software or CRM experience, let me know—that’s a plus.

I’m ready to start right away and will give you the script, calendar link, and lead list as soon as we agree on terms. Let’s talk if you can jump on the phones and turn prospects into scheduled sales meetings.

title: Loan Prediction Model with Imbalanced Data Handling
desc:
I have a historical lending dataset that requires a full end-to-end machine-learning workflow. First, I need thorough data preprocessing and exploratory analysis: identify and treat missing values, detect and cap or remove outliers, and inspect the class distribution. In this project the key concern is minority class under-representation, so any resampling or cost-sensitive approach you propose should directly address that imbalance.

For feature engineering I want, at minimum, robust encoding of all categorical variables and consistent scaling or normalizing of the numeric fields before they enter the models. Feel free to add creative interactions if they genuinely improve recall without overfitting.

Once the data pipeline is solid, train and compare several classification algorithms—Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost and, if you believe it will help, a simple neural network. Optimisation focuses on accuracy, precision, recall and ROC-AUC, but recall carries the highest weight because false negatives (missed defaulters) are the most expensive error for me.

Deliverables:  
• Cleaned, feature-engineered dataset ready for inference  
• Jupyter or Colab notebook (or well-documented Python scripts) that reproduces preprocessing, modelling, and evaluation  
• Comparative metrics table highlighting the best performing model by recall and ROC-AUC  
• Saved model file plus load-and-predict script  

Bonus (preferred): wrap the chosen model in a lightweight Streamlit or Fla

title: Advanced Manual QA Tester Needed — Flutter App
desc:
Type: Fixed-price project (with option to extend into ongoing QA)
Category: Mobile QA / Manual Testing
Duration estimate: 1–2 weeks

Overview

We have a Flutter mobile app (Android + iOS) for a sports-coaching marketplace — athletes book sessions with coaches and academies, three user roles (Athlete, Coach, Academy) plus an Admin panel, real backend and real data.

Basic QA is already done in-house — core happy-path flows (signup, browse, book, cancel, basic profile edits) have already been tested and are working. We do not need someone to click through the obvious flows again. We need an experienced QA tester who can find the bugs that basic testing misses: edge cases, race conditions, concurrent-user scenarios, partial/malformed input, boundary conditions, and the kind of subtle data-integrity issues that only show up under adversarial or unusual usage — not someone doing a first-pass functional walkthrough.

If your QA process is "follow the happy path and confirm it works," this isn't the right fit. If you actively try to break things — rapid double-taps, concurrent sessions, partial form submissions, weird input, interrupted flows — please apply.

The debug APK will be shared directly with the freelancer selected for this job (not posted publicly).

What You'll Need

- A physical Android device or emulator — we'll provide a debug APK once you're selected
- Ability to install and sideload a debug build
- Strong bug-report writing: steps, expected vs. actual, screenshots/s

title: Growth Strategy & Social Audit
desc:
I need a fresh, objective look at my current growth-marketing set-up and the underlying business model. Your task is to run a full audit, spot the gaps, and package clear, data-backed recommendations I can implement right away.  

Scope  
• Examine the entire funnel, from acquisition through retention, to see where my present strategy underperforms.  
• Analyse revenue streams, pricing, and positioning so I understand whether the business model itself is hindering growth.  
• Dive deep into my social-media presence—this is the core channel for brand awareness—to pinpoint why engagement with the audience has plateaued and how to revitalise it.  

I’m especially interested in practical, channel-specific tactics that will help me interact authentically with the followers I already have, rather than simply chasing vanity-metric follower counts.  

Deliverables  
1. A concise audit report outlining key findings for strategy, funnel, and business model.  
2. An actionable playbook for social-media engagement, complete with content themes, posting cadence, and sample copy.  
3. A 60-day prioritised roadmap tying each recommendation to expected impact and required resources.  

If you’re fluent in growth frameworks, seasoned with tools such as Google Analytics, Meta Business Suite, and any relevant social-listening platforms, and you can explain insights in plain language, I’d love to review your proposal and discuss next steps.

title: ATO Payroll Reporting Correction
desc:
I'm seeking an experienced payroll specialist to resolve issues with ATO payroll reporting. specifically discrepancies we see payroll reports in MYOB and figures appearing STP year-end finalization and ATO employee payment summaries for year ending 30 June 2026.

Key Requirements:
- Review and correct employee data
- Ensure payment summaries align with ATO records
- Experience with ATO reporting and payroll systems
- Attention to detail and accuracy

Ideal Skills:
- Familiarity with ATO regulations
- Strong background in payroll processing
- Ability to troubleshoot and resolve discrepancies

Looking for someone who can ensure compliance and accuracy in our payroll reporting.

title: Custom Domain Email Solution
desc:
I am ready to move our team onto a reliable, hosted email platform that runs on our own domain. A hosted service is a must—we do not want to manage servers in-house—yet I am still weighing which provider (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Zoho Mail, or another you can justify) will serve us best.  

Beyond standard mailbox creation, I need enough flexibility to support our recruitment workflow: shared folders or labels for candidate threads, easy delegation, and simple integration with the ATS and calendar invites we already use. Large storage, robust spam filtering, and built-in collaboration tools (docs, calendars, chats) are desirable if they fit the same package.

Here is what I expect from you:  
• A concise comparison of at least two hosted options outlining costs, security features, storage limits, and how each could handle the recruitment-specific needs above.  
• End-to-end setup of the chosen platform, including DNS changes (MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC), creation of all user mailboxes/aliases, and activation on desktop and mobile clients.  
• A brief hand-off guide or screen-share session so my team understands how to access their new accounts, share folders, and manage basic admin tasks.

Success is when every user can send and receive mail through our custom domain without disruption, spam is appropriately filtered, and our recruitment team’s shared workflow is live on day one. If you have rolled out Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Zoho Mail, or a similar hosted service

title: Modern Florida Home Design & Plans
desc:
I need a complete, permit-ready architectural package for a modern single-family home in Florida. The scope covers both interior and exterior design, full construction drawings, plus all structural and MEP engineering required for local code and hurricane-resistant compliance.

Key design directives  
• Modern aesthetic throughout  
• Open floor plan that flows naturally from kitchen to great room  
• Expansive windows to maximize daylight and views  
• Seamless indoor–outdoor living with a covered lanai or similar outdoor space

Deliverables  
1. Schematic concepts (floor plans, elevations, 3D massing) for review and refinement  
2. Final architectural drawings: dimensioned floor plans, elevations, roof plan, sections, door/window schedules, reflected ceiling plans  
3. Structural, electrical, plumbing, and HVAC engineering sheets stamped for Florida jurisdiction  
4. Site plan showing setbacks, grading, and utility runs  
5. High-resolution 3D renderings of key interior and exterior views  
6. Digital set (DWG + PDF) ready for submission to the county permitting office

Acceptance criteria  
• Drawings meet the latest Florida Building Code and wind-load requirements  
• Room sizes, window placements, and exterior materials follow the approved schematic design  
• Coordination across all disciplines—no clashes between architectural intent and engineering layouts

I will provide lot survey, program requirements, and any HOA guidelines at project start. Please outline your typ

title: Need a GTM person
desc:
We’re building Mallet, an AI-native operating system for service trade businesses (electricians, plumbers, HVAC, roofing, landscaping, etc.). Our platform helps contractors run and grow their businesses without the complexity and cost of legacy software like Jobber and Housecall Pro.

We’re looking for someone to own our outbound email GTM from strategy through execution.

Scope of Work

You will be responsible for building and optimizing our outbound engine, including:

* Defining our outbound GTM strategy
* Identifying high-value customer segments
* Building targeted prospect lists
* Writing cold email sequences that generate replies
* Setting up and managing email infrastructure (domains, inboxes, deliverability)
* Running campaigns and continuously optimizing performance
* A/B testing messaging, offers, subject lines, and CTAs
* Tracking KPIs and providing weekly performance reports
* Iterating quickly based on data

What We’re Looking For

* Proven experience scaling B2B SaaS outbound
* Strong understanding of cold email infrastructure and deliverability
* Experience with tools like Smartlead, Instantly, Clay, Apollo, Ocean.io, or similar
* Ability to write personalized cold emails that actually get responses
* Data-driven mindset with strong analytical skills
* Bonus if you’ve worked with vertical SaaS or service businesses

Success Metrics

* Positive reply rate
* Qualified meetings booked
* Cost per qualified meeting
* Pipeline generated
* Overall ROI on outbound camp

title: Tmall Store Setup & Sales
desc:
I’m ready to launch my first Tmall store from scratch with one clear objective—drive solid, sustainable revenue. Because I don’t yet have a storefront on the platform, I’ll need end-to-end support: guiding me through the official merchant registration, configuring Alipay and taxes, designing a convincing storefront that suits the brand, and listing our initial product line so it meets all Tmall compliance rules.  

Once the shop is live, I also want to see a go-to-market plan that covers traffic acquisition inside the Alibaba ecosystem (Super Recommendations, live-stream rooms, Alimama ads) and any proven external channels that can convert Chinese shoppers quickly. Practical advice on customer service workflow, preferred logistics partners, and KPI dashboards inside Tmall / Taobao Seller Center will help ensure the store can scale without constant firefighting.  

Key deliverables  
• Approved Tmall merchant account and operational storefront  
• Optimised product pages (images, Chinese copywriting, keyword tags) ready for launch  
• Promotion calendar and first-month ad campaign set up with clear ROI targets  
• Training call or handbook so my team can handle daily orders, chat responses, and data tracking  

If you’ve successfully opened and grown revenue-focused Tmall stores before, let’s make this one another success.

title: Extension Payment & Supabase Setup
desc:
I have a cross-browser extension (Chrome, Firefox and Edge) that is nearly ready for a public beta and now needs a rock-solid subscription layer and cloud backend.  

The Razorpay gateway is already wired in, but I need you to review every part of that flow, tighten security, add the right webhooks and push clean subscription metadata into Supabase so the extension can enforce usage limits and sync settings across devices.

Here is the concrete scope:

• Payment layer  
  – Audit the existing Razorpay integration, ensure tokens are handled securely and failures are surfaced gracefully.  
  – Create/verify webhooks for success, failure, renewal, cancellation and expiry.  

• Supabase & backend  
  – Design the tables for plans, users and usage, then hook them up to the extension via REST or RPC.  
  – Implement Supabase Auth so users sign in once and stay synced everywhere.  

• Testing  
  – Provide extensive testing with edge cases: simulate network drops, webhook retries, card declines, plan upgrades/downgrades and expired sessions. Automated test scripts are welcome if they speed things up.  

• Browser-side work  
  – Make sure the Manifest V3 code handles subscription state correctly in Chrome, Firefox and Edge.  
  – Polish the AI-powered note summarisation/chat feature so it respects usage limits.  

Everything lives in a private GitHub repo; regular pull requests and clear commit messages are required. When the above is stable, we’ll tag a beta release and submit it t

title: Neighborhood Google Business Profiles Setup
desc:
I run a service-based home-services company and I need several Google Business Profiles built and properly verified—one for each key neighbourhood in our city. The goal is simple: when a homeowner searches locally, the profile tied to their neighbourhood shows up, complete with accurate NAP details, service categories and photos that reflect that specific area.  

I will supply the core business information, branding assets and neighbourhood list. You’ll handle the creation, phone or postcard verification (whichever Google prompts), optimisation of each listing, and a brief hand-off note so I know how to maintain them going forward.  

Please make sure every profile:  
• uses unique, location-specific descriptions   
• is placed in the correct “Home services” categories   
• has geo-tagged images and service area settings that match the neighbourhood served  

Once everything is live and verified, send me the direct profile links and the login credentials so I can monitor insights. If you’ve done multi-location GBP work before, especially for trades or home services, let me know in your proposal—screenshots or sample URLs are welcome.

title: Travel PPC Ads Specialist
desc:
I need an experienced paid-media professional who already understands the nuances of selling travel. You should bring five to eight solid years running both Google Ads and Meta (Facebook & Instagram) Ads specifically for tour operators, DMCs or OTAs, because the brief is simple: keep our funnels full of qualified travellers and turn them into bookings.  

We sell completely customised itineraries that can blend adventure, luxury and culture in a single trip, so each campaign has to speak to different intents across the customer journey. Your work will start with a competitive keyword and interest analysis, followed by full-funnel campaign builds, audience segmentation, pixel/tag implementation and conversion-focused creative on both platforms.  

Please be ready to:  
• Launch and continuously optimise Search, Performance Max, Discovery, Reels and Carousel placements.  
• Design remarketing flows that shorten the enquiry-to-booking window.  
• Report weekly on CPL, ROAS and booking value, using Google Analytics 4 and Meta Business Suite.  

Acceptance criteria: the first thirty days should show live campaigns, accurate tracking for every lead form and call, and an initial CPL that matches or beats our historical benchmark. After that, I expect steady month-on-month improvements in lead volume, quality and ROAS. If you have proven results in the travel sector and can hit those numbers, let’s talk.

title: Complete Activewear Line Design
desc:
I’m creating a fresh, cohesive active-wear collection and need a fashion designer who can take charge of the full design process for tops, bottoms, and outerwear. The goal is to end up with a small but distinctive line that feels performance-driven yet stylish enough for everyday wear.

Here’s what I’m looking for you to handle:
• Concept and mood-board development that shows a clear point of view for the whole range  
• Detailed tech packs for each item (tops, bottoms, outerwear) with fabric suggestions, colorways, trims, and construction notes ready for sampling  
• Print or graphic placement concepts where relevant  
• Size-spec sheets so factories can move straight to prototyping  

I value iterative collaboration, so please be comfortable sharing early sketches, revising based on feedback, and preparing final ready-for-manufacture files (Adobe Illustrator and PDF preferred).

If you have a portfolio with previous activewear pieces—or anything that shows an eye for functional fit and modern aesthetics—send it along with a brief note about how you approach material selection and performance testing. Let’s build something that athletes and casual movers alike will love to wear.

title: Modern Interior SketchUp Rendering
desc:
I’m looking for a SketchUp specialist who can turn my clubhouse concept into polished, photo-ready interior visuals. The space needs to read as distinctly modern—clean lines, balanced lighting, and a contemporary palette that highlights the architecture without feeling sterile.

You’ll start from my existing floor plan and reference images (I’ll share them once we kick off) and build the full 3D model in Google SketchUp. From there, I need high-resolution, interior-focused renderings that capture the main gathering zone, the bar/lounge corner, and a flexible seating area. Natural daylight, realistic material reflections, and subtle accent lighting are key; the goal is imagery I can present straight to stakeholders without extra post-production.

Deliverables expected:
• .skp file with all layers and textures intact  
• 3–5 final rendered JPEG/PNG images at 4K resolution  
• The lighting and material settings so I can tweak them later if needed  

If you prefer V-Ray, Enscape, or another plugin for the final output, that’s completely fine as long as the raw SketchUp model remains fully editable. Let me know your typical turnaround and any similar modern interior work you’ve done, and we can get started right away.

title: Build a Selling Website and Digital Marketing for Portfolio
desc:
I need a freelancer to help me set up a selling website for my Elegant Digital Fashion Portfolio, paired with effective digital marketing strategies to attract buyers. Key deliverables include:

1. A responsive, user-friendly website tailored for selling portfolio designs.
2. Integrated payment gateway for seamless transactions.
3. SEO optimization to ensure visibility on search engines.
4. Social media marketing strategy to target potential buyers and drive sales.
5. Analytics and tools to track sales and audience engagement.

Looking forward to working with someone skilled in web development and digital marketing who can bring this vision to life.

title: Enhance Kamyabi.in UI & Speed
desc:
I built Kamyabi.in—the job portal you will review—inside GoDaddy’s Airo website builder. The site is online and functional, yet the overall user experience still feels basic and the pages open a bit slower than I would like. I’m ready to hand the next stage of polish to a specialist who can quickly elevate both its look and its performance.

Scope of work  
• User Interface upgrades  
  ‑ Redesign the homepage so it immediately communicates value and encourages sign-ups.  
  ‑ Rework the navigation menu for cleaner, more intuitive browsing.  
  ‑ Refine the search and filter components so jobseekers can narrow results with fewer clicks.  
• Performance tuning  
  ‑ Bring initial page load to under two seconds on both desktop and mobile (current desktop score hovers around the 60s on PageSpeed).  
  ‑ Optimise images, minify CSS/JS, and add lazy-loading or CDN support where the GoDaddy environment allows.

Acceptance criteria  
1. New UI is implemented in Airo (or via custom code injection) without breaking existing database-driven pages.  
2. Google PageSpeed Insights shows “Good” in Core Web Vitals for the homepage and listings page.  
3. All key user flows—register, search, apply—remain functional after the makeover.  
4. You document every change so I can maintain it myself later.

Please reply with:  
• A concise plan of attack for each bullet above  
• Estimated timeline (in days) from kickoff to final hand-over  
• Fixed or milestone-based cost

Feel free to link to any

title: Grow Twitter & YouTube Audiences
desc:
I need a marketer who can treat Twitter and YouTube with equal importance and build a coordinated growth plan that lifts follower and subscriber counts on both platforms. The heart of the campaign is educational content: concise Twitter threads, bite-sized tips, and longer-form YouTube videos that teach our audience something genuinely useful while naturally weaving in our brand.

I will supply branding assets, topic outlines, and access to the existing channels. You will refine the content calendar, draft posts and video scripts, handle scheduling with tools such as Hootsuite / Buffer and YouTube Studio, and track performance in Twitter Analytics and YouTube Analytics. Clear, data-backed iteration is essential so we steadily grow week over week.

Deliverables:
• A 30-day cross-platform content calendar focused on educational pieces  
• Five Twitter thread drafts and corresponding visual assets  
• Two YouTube video scripts with thumbnail concepts  
• End-of-month report summarizing follower- and subscriber-growth metrics plus next-step recommendations

Success is defined by measurable increases in followers and subscribers, and I’ll review progress every two weeks to keep momentum high. If this pilot month meets targets, there’s plenty of scope for ongoing work.

title: RF Surveillance Detection & Evidence Report
desc:
I’m experiencing suspicious radio-frequency activity that appears to shadow me from place to place. To put the matter to rest—and, if warranted, take legal action—I need a qualified RF engineer to carry out a comprehensive signal analysis, identify any illicit transmitters, and compile hard evidence.

Scope of work  
• Perform an on-site and near-site sweep that covers my home and the immediate surroundings, with attention to possible satellite-related links.  
• Use professional-grade spectrum analysers, SDR setups, near-field probes, and direction-finding gear to hunt for audio bugs, covert video cameras, and GPS trackers—each is a genuine concern.  
• Log every anomaly, capture signal characteristics (frequency, modulation, duty cycle, power level, timestamps), and map the location of each source.  
• Produce a concise, court-ready report that explains methodology, raw data, findings, and your expert conclusion on whether illegal surveillance is occurring.

Acceptance criteria  
1. A written technical report (PDF) backed by spectrum plots, waterfall screenshots, and GPS-tagged photographs of any discovered device or antenna.  
2. A short summary section written in plain English that my attorney can reference directly.  
3. All raw measurement files (CSV/IQ recordings) supplied for independent verification.

Please indicate the primary tools you intend to deploy and your availability for on-site work, and confirm any relevant certifications or prior bug-sweep experience whe

title: Carwash Vending Control PCB Design
desc:
I need a compact, production-ready circuit board that acts as the main control system for a self-service car-wash vending unit. Its first responsibility is to handle payment processing—accepting coins, bills, and potentially a simple cashless module—then trigger the wash cycle once payment is validated.  

You will translate this into a complete hardware package: schematic, multilayer PCB layout, and a cleanly organised BOM with readily available components. I will provide the pin-out for the existing coin validator and the relay map for the wash equipment; you make sure the board routes power safely, isolates high-current lines, and exposes clean connectors for future add-ons such as water-flow control and a small customer display.  

Because the installation sits in a damp outdoor environment, board protections like conformal-coating recommendations, TVS diodes on external inputs, and wide temperature-rated parts are essential. Please use industry-standard design tools—KiCad, Altium or Eagle are all acceptable as long as the final files are fully editable.  

Deliverables (all required for sign-off):
• Editable schematic and PCB files, Gerbers, and pick-and-place data  
• Complete BOM with supplier links and part lifecycles  
• Brief design note highlighting protection features, connector pin-outs, and test points  

I will review the design in two milestones: schematic first, then board layout. Let me know your preferred tool chain and estimated turnaround for each stage s

title: European Private Investigation Support
desc:
I need a reliable professional based somewhere in Europe who can act as my on-the-ground resource for an ongoing private investigation. The core objective is to gather accurate, verifiable information and communicate it to me promptly so I can make informed decisions.

What you might do
• Visit specific locations to observe and discreetly document activity.  
• Verify facts by talking with local contacts, checking public records, or confirming timelines.  
• Capture clear photos, videos, or scanned documents as evidence where legally permissible.  
• Compile concise written summaries of each assignment, highlighting key findings and next-step recommendations.

Key expectations
• You already reside in, or can easily travel within, the relevant European country or region.  
• You understand and respect local privacy and data-protection laws.  
• You work independently yet keep me updated in real time through secure channels.  
• Discretion, integrity, and meticulous attention to detail are essential.

If you have experience in surveillance, background checks, or evidence collection, please outline it—though the exact mix of tasks will depend on each individual incident. When you apply, briefly describe the European areas you can cover, the investigative tools you’re comfortable using, and at least one example of a similar assignment you’ve handled.

title: Versatile Content Writer Needed
desc:
I need fresh, well-researched content that can shift easily between blog articles, website sections, and product descriptions. Each piece should be crafted to boost organic traffic, educate readers, and, when relevant, spotlight specific products or services. The exact tone will vary by assignment—sometimes conversational, other times formal or deeply technical—so an adaptable writing voice is essential.

I will supply keywords, target personas, and any reference materials. You will turn those inputs into engaging copy that is SEO-friendly yet natural to read. Please deliver every draft in Google Docs with clear headings and an accompanying meta title and meta description.

Deliverables  
• 3–5 publish-ready pieces per week (800–1,000 words each unless noted)  
• On-page SEO elements (H1–H3 structure, internal link suggestions)  
• Original, plagiarism-free text verified via Copyscape  

Acceptance Criteria  
• Reads smoothly for a human audience while meeting keyword intent  
• Zero factual inaccuracies and no AI detection flags  
• Final copy shared on or before the agreed deadline, open to one round of revisions  

If you have a diverse portfolio that demonstrates range across industries and tones, I would love to review it.

title: Commerce SaaS Naming Expert
desc:
I’m developing a modern SaaS platform that will act as a complete Commerce Operating System, giving online merchants a single, centralized dashboard that ties together every e-commerce integration they rely on—from marketplaces and social channels to shipping providers. Because the product’s positioning is highly professional and its core value is seamless e-commerce integration, I now need a strong, memorable name anchored in the word “Commerce” yet fresh enough to scale globally.

Here’s what I’d like from you:  
• 8-12 original brand names that sound professional, work well in English, and clearly hint at our all-in-one commerce mission.  
• A brief rationale for each suggestion highlighting tone, meaning, and how it reinforces the integration focus.  
• A quick check of .com domain availability (or best alternative if the exact match is taken).  

I’ll review for clarity, uniqueness, and fit with our professional brand voice. If one of your proposals becomes the final choice, we can discuss a follow-up engagement for tagline and logo work.

title: Affordable Patent Filing Attorney Needed
desc:
I already have the full specifications, drawings, and claims finalized for my next patent application. All I need now is an experienced Indian patent attorney who can take these documents, prepare the Form 1–5 package, and e-file it with the Indian Patent Office under the Startup Scheme at a competitive professional fee.  

My goal is straightforward:  
• File in India first and obtain the application number and filing receipts quickly.  
• Within the priority year, move the same application into the PCT route—so I would like your advice, timelines, and a clear cost breakdown for that second step as well.  

Because the drafting is complete, your work will focus on formality review, filing, and any immediate follow-ups such as Form 3 or clarifications from the Controller. I am not yet certain whether translations will be needed for the PCT phase, so please indicate how you handle that and quote it separately.  

Deliverables (acceptance criteria)  
1. Successful e-filing in India with proof of submission, application number, and PDF copies of every document stamped by IPO.  
2. A brief report on next steps, government deadlines, and your professional fee structure for the PCT filing, including optional translation support.  

Please highlight your previous experience with utility patents (full specs) and your familiarity with both the Indian startup fee schedule and WIPO’s ePCT portal. Transparent, milestone-based pricing will be the key factor in my hiring decision.

title: U.S. Tax Return Filing Needed
desc:
Summary
I am seeking an experienced U.S. tax professional (CPA, Enrolled Agent, or Chartered Accountant with U.S. tax experience). I welcome proposals from qualified professionals worldwide and prefer India-based accountants or firms experienced in U.S. tax preparation.

I need preparation and electronic filing of my 2025 U.S. Federal and North Carolina individual income tax returns for my sole proprietorship, NCON Construction Group.

My bookkeeping is complete. I am not seeking bookkeeping services. I have prepared categorized business transactions, Schedule C workpapers, home office and vehicle expense schedules, payroll records, and supporting documentation.

The engagement includes:

Review of my tax workpapers
Preparation of Form 1040, Schedule C, and NC return
Review of Paychex payroll issues
Determine whether amended payroll returns or corrected forms (Forms 941-X, W-2c, and W-3c) are required
Electronic filing and PDF copies of all completed returns

Please include your U.S. tax experience, experience with Schedule C and payroll corrections, software used, estimated completion time, and a fixed-fee proposal. I am seeking a long-term relationship with a knowledgeable tax professional for future tax preparation and planning.
s

title: Google Meta Investor Leads Campaign
desc:
I need a performance-driven marketer to plan, build, and optimise lead-generation campaigns on both Google Ads and Meta (Facebook / Instagram). My real estate company specialises in properties that appeal to serious investors, so every element—from ad copy and creative to keyword groups and audience targeting—must speak directly to that segment.  

Here’s what I’m looking for:  
• A full-funnel strategy that captures qualified investor inquiries and routes them to my CRM.  
• Compelling ad creatives, headlines, and visuals that highlight ROI potential, rental yields, or capital-growth stories.  
• Precise audience setups: custom and look-alike investor lists on Meta, plus tightly themed keyword groups on Google Search and Display.  
• Conversion-ready landing pages or, if you prefer, clear briefs for my web team so we can track leads via pixel and GA4.  
• Ongoing optimisation—budget allocations, bid adjustments, and A/B tests—to keep cost-per-lead trending downward while volume rises.  
• Transparent weekly reporting summarising spend, leads, CPL, and next steps.

I already have brand guidelines, listing photos, and investment case studies ready to feed into the creative process. If you’re confident scaling campaigns that turn clicks into committed investor leads, let’s get started.

title: Find An Lincoln Center Event Ad on Your Phone - Need to be Physically at Lincoln Center
desc:
Limited Time Project - 07/19 Sunday Only
No skills required, but this will be much easier for you if you have long lasting interest in dance and art.

I need help tracking down a very specific event advertisement connected to Lincoln Center. The task is two-fold: 

1. Visit the Lincoln Center campus in New York City and look for an advertisement on selected webpages that matches the event.  
2. Search only the websites I list below—nytimes.com, wsj.com, nymag.com, vulture.com, ft.com/arts, vox.com, bkmag.com, frieze.com, npr.org, vanityfair.com, architecturaldigest.com and broadwayworld.com—for the same ad.

The final goal is one clear screenshot of the ads on your phone & A high-resolution photo of your phone in Lincoln Center, showing the ad on your phone.

Because I already know the ad exists, this should take between thirty minutes and two hours at Lincoln Center if you move efficiently. Please timestamp your findings and note exactly where you spotted them—so I can verify placement.

I will release the milestone as soon as I receive:  

• A photo and screenshot
• The source location (precise web URL or on-site spot)  
• A brief note of the time you captured it

This is a quick, detail-oriented assignment, perfect for someone already near Lincoln Center who is comfortable hopping between the sites listed above.

title: Aplikasi Penghasil Uang Android iOS
desc:
Saya ingin menghadirkan sebuah aplikasi mobile yang membantu pengguna memperoleh penghasilan tambahan dengan cara yang sederhana dan terukur. Aplikasi perlu dirilis di kedua platform, Android dan iOS, sehingga basis kode idealnya lintas-platform (React Native, Flutter, atau pendekatan serupa) agar pemeliharaan lebih efisien.

Target utama:
• Alur onboarding yang mudah dipahami agar pengguna cepat mulai menghasilkan.
• Mekanisme monetisasi yang jelas—misalnya sistem komisi, program referral, atau penawaran tugas berbayar—silakan ajukan ide mana yang paling realistis.
• Dashboard ringkas yang menampilkan pendapatan, riwayat transaksi, dan notifikasi status penarikan.
• Integrasi pembayaran lokal (e-wallet, transfer bank) maupun internasional (contoh: PayPal) supaya penarikan dana fleksibel.
• Modul keamanan dasar: autentikasi dua langkah, verifikasi email/nomor ponsel, dan enkripsi data sensitif.

Harapan deliverable:
1. Prototype fungsional di Android & iOS beserta source code lengkap.
2. Dokumen penjelasan arsitektur, flow utama, serta instruksi build.
3. Sesi hand-off singkat (video call atau rekaman) untuk walkthrough fitur dan deployment.

Saya terbuka pada rekomendasi desain UI/UX serta stack teknologi terbaik asalkan performa tetap ringan. Sebutkan pengalaman Anda membuat aplikasi serupa, contoh portofolio, dan estimasi waktu pengerjaan.

title: Creative AI Short-Form Video Editor for Social Media Content
desc:
My agency publishes bite-sized lessons that teach freelancers how to work smarter with clients and land more jobs. I’ll supply a clear script for each lesson; you’ll transform it into an eye-catching vertical video that feels smooth and professional from first frame to last.

Here’s the flow I have in mind. You receive the script plus any reference assets, trim the key takes, then polish the edit with purposeful pacing rather than frantic cuts. Animation overlays, clean text graphics, and well-timed transitions should highlight the tips and keep viewers watching on Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube Shorts. Think of the final result as a mini-masterclass wrapped in an engaging social wrapper.

AI-assisted tools are welcome whether that’s auto-captioning in Premiere Pro, motion graphics in After Effects, or smart reframing in CapCut.

As long as the output looks handcrafted and on-brand, the workflow is up to you.

Deliverables for each lesson  
• 30-60 s 9:16 MP4 ready for upload  
• Matching SRT captions  
• Project file or editable template so my team can tweak text in the future  

I review quickly and provide concise feedback; expect a steady queue of scripts once we lock in the first style. If you excel at turning solid educational copy into scroll-stopping short-form videos, let’s start with a trial edit and build from there.

title: 2D Sprite Artist for Robot Face Expressions
desc:
I am developing a small cute robot with a digital animated face displayed on a small screen. It's a demo project for personal use. I need a 2D artist to create a reusable library of layered facial-expression sprites based on the reference images I will provide.

Some files for example are attached for reference.

This is NOT a traditional frame-by-frame animation project.

The robot face will be assembled in software using separate graphical layers. Different sprites will be combined at runtime to create facial expressions and animations.

The main facial layers are:

1. Outer Eye
2. Eyeball / Inner Eye
3. Mouth
4. Eye/Facial Highlights

A small number of additional effect sprites, such as tears, may also be required.

The goal is to create approximately 25–35 unique reusable sprite designs that can be mixed and matched to generate many different facial expressions.

========================================

1. Outer Eye Sprites
I need approximately 7–9 unique outer-eye expression designs.
These may include:

Neutral / fully open eye
Happy / smiling eye
Sad eye
Excited / wide-open eye
Bored eye
Disgusted / uncomfortable eye
Closed eye / blink
1–2 partial-eye states for blink, sleepy, or transition use
The partial-eye sprites are only required for a few useful transition states. I do not need separate partial versions for every facial expression.
Left and right eye assets should be separate where required.
The outer-eye sprite must remain separate from the eyeball / inner-eye

title: Long Word Document Formatting
desc:
My Word file has grown past the 68 page mark and the layout is now all over the place. I need someone who knows Microsoft Word inside out to bring it back into shape. 

Here is what I expect:

• Apply a clean, consistent set of styles so every heading level, paragraph, and list item follows the same rules.  
• Tidy up margins, line-spacing, indents, and page breaks so the document prints neatly without stray blank pages.  
• Standardise bullet points and numbering (including any multilevel lists) so nothing jumps around.  
• Insert headers, footers, and page numbers that stay correct even if pages shift.  
• Deliver the final, fully editable .docx plus a print-ready PDF.

No design overhaul is needed—just professional, reliable formatting that makes the content easy to read and ready for sharing. If you have proven experience rescuing long Word documents, I’d love to see a quick before-and-after sample from past work and hear how soon you could turn this around.

title: Checco Zalone-Style Graduation Video Parody
desc:
Title: Italian Comedy-Style Graduation Greeting Video

I am looking for a talented video creator, impersonator or actor to produce a funny graduation greeting in Italian for my friend Claudia.

The video should be inspired by the style and comic energy associated with Checco Zalone, but it must be presented clearly as an unofficial parody. It must not use an unauthorized clone of his real voice or create the false impression that the message was genuinely recorded or endorsed by him.

Requirements:

* Spoken language: Italian
* Duration: approximately 45–60 seconds
* Occasion: Claudia’s graduation in Law
* Tone: funny, affectionate and celebratory
* High-quality, realistic video production
* Preferably performed by a talented lookalike or impersonator using their own performance and voice
* Include a visible or closing disclaimer such as: “Parodia non ufficiale realizzata a scopo di intrattenimento”
* Suitable for sharing privately with friends and guests via WhatsApp
* No defamatory, offensive or inappropriate jokes

I can provide Claudia’s name, graduation details, two funny reference photos and the information needed to write a personalised script.

Please send me:

1. Examples of similar parody or impersonation videos
2. Your proposed creative approach
3. Delivery time
4. Total price
5. Confirmation that you have the rights and permissions for all performances and materials used

title: Codebase Collaboration for AI Training
desc:
I’m expanding an AI model and want to license real-world C#, C++, and Python repositories for data collaboration. Whether your code powers a desktop, web, mobile, or backend product, production-ready or legacy, I’m interested in a long-term, secure partnership.

Here’s the flow I have in mind: we sign a two-way NDA, you grant read-only access (Git, SVN, or a zipped snapshot), and I use the material strictly for internal model training—no redistribution, no public release. You keep full ownership at all times.

Deliverables  
• Executed confidentiality agreement  
• Repository dump or access link to your C#, C++, or Python project  
• Brief architecture/domain overview so the data makes sense  
• Commercial terms or licensing notes we agree on  

Acceptance criteria  
• Codebase builds or installs with the toolchain you specify  
• Credentials and personal data removed or redacted  
• Access restricted to my team only, verifiable via logs  

If a secure data collaboration like this appeals to you, tell me a little about your project’s size, domain, and preferred revenue or royalty structure, and we can move forward right away.

title: Copy Type Handwritten Pag document
desc:
I have a collection of handwritten documents—between 11 and 50 pages—that I need accurately re-typed into an editable digital format (Microsoft Word or Google Docs). Every word must be transcribed exactly as written, with correct spelling, punctuation, and paragraph breaks.

If you have solid copy-typing experience and can handle handwriting with care, I’m ready to share the files and get started right away.

title: Commissioned Web & Software solution Cold Callers

You’ll be selling robust, high-ticket enterprise solutions, so conversations sometimes involve multiple stakeholders and a longer decision cycle. Your job is to break the ice, qualify fit, handle common objections, and secure the next commitment on the path to purchase. I provide lead lists, a brief product deck, call scripts as a starting point.

This role is 100 % commission based. The commission structure is straightforward 5 -7% of invoice value: once the contract is signed and the first invoice is paid, you receive an agreed percentage of the deal value, wired immediately. There is no cap—larger contracts mean larger payouts.

Deliverables I expect after each calling block are:
• Updated notes with call outcomes  
• Scheduled demos or meetings for our solution engineers, or fully closed deals where possible

If you have a proven record of turning cold prospects into enterprise software customers and you’re motivated by uncapped earnings, let’s talk.

title: Render PDF Fully Searchable
desc:
I need a seasoned Acrobat professional to take my original statements—downloaded directly from the issuing source—and correct the underlying technical flaws that are preventing automated verification. The platform flags the file for missing text layers, OCR / searchability problems, and metadata issues. I also suspect deeper PDF structure and general compatibility concerns that may be contributing to the rejection.

Key objectives  
• Re-enable true text search without touching a single visible character, date, or figure.  
• Rebuild or embed any absent text layer cleanly via Acrobat’s OCR or a comparable, loss-free method.  
• Validate and, if necessary, repair metadata so it meets standard digital-PDF requirements.  
• Inspect font embedding, object hierarchy, and XMP to confirm there are no lurking structure or compatibility errors.  
• Deliver the final file in the same visual state it was issued—no redactions, no resizing, no content changes—along with a concise summary of the fixes you applied and the validation tests you ran.

Documents were downloaded to Adobe as pdfs. so you’ll be working inside a familiar ecosystem. If you plan to move the workflow into Preflight, PDF/A validation tools, or specialized OCR engines, just outline that approach before you begin.

Successful completion means the platform accepts the document instantly, every layer is machine-readable, and the file opens flawlessly across current Acrobat versions and common PDF viewers.

• Copywriting  
  Craft engaging captions, headlines, and hashtags that resonate with teens, parents, educators, and community allies while staying sensitive to the topic.

• Publishing & Community Management  
  Schedule posts, monitor comments, and keep the conversation respectful and supportive.  I will provide final sign-off on all content before it goes live.

Acceptance criteria  
– Content calendar approved before any posting begins  
– Minimum of eight origin

title: Growth Expansion Business Plan Writer
desc:
I need a comprehensive growth / expansion business plan that shows precisely how we will widen our market reach and roll out into new domestic regions. The plan should zero-in on both market expansion—winning a larger share of our current customer base—and geographical expansion, outlining which states or cities we should prioritise first and why they make strategic sense.

I will provide historical sales data, current operating costs, and an outline of our existing product mix. What I’m missing is a clear, investor-ready roadmap that translates those numbers into credible projections and actionable steps. I expect you to ground your recommendations in solid market research (industry reports, competitor benchmarks, and demographic insights) and to build financial forecasts that cover at least the next three years.

Key deliverables:
• Written growth / expansion business plan (MS Word or Google Docs)  
• Market analysis with cited data sources  
• Three-year financial model in Excel with assumptions clearly labeled  
• Timeline and milestones for phased domestic roll-out  
• Risk assessment with mitigation strategies  

I value clarity and concise reasoning—every section should tie directly back to our goal of expanding market share and footprint within the country. If you have created similar growth plans before, especially for domestic launches, that experience will be a plus.

title: Comprehensive AutoCAD Engineering Drawings For an STP
desc:
This project requires a full suite of engineering drawings delivered in native AutoCAD format. I will provide every calculation, sketch, and reference you need; your task is to translate that information into clear, GFC Drawings.

Each drawing category carries equal priority—layout plans, hydraulic flow diagrams, structural drawings, plus the associated P&IDs and general arrangements all sit on the critical path. Accuracy, clean layering, consistent line weights, and sensible file naming are essential because these drawings flow straight to procurement and construction.

Deliverables (DWG + PDF for each):

• Overall layout plans for every unit  
• Hydraulic flow diagrams tied to the supplied calculations  
• Process & instrumentation diagrams (P&IDs) with tag lists intact  
• General arrangement drawings showing footprints, elevations, and key interfaces  
• Structural drawings covering framing, supports, and anchorage details  

I review drawings in two stages: a preliminary check for completeness and a final approval round, so factor at least one revision cycle into your schedule.

Please attach samples of past work that demonstrate similar multi-discipline drawing sets produced in AutoCAD. If the quality aligns with our standards, I will share the full data package and milestones.

title: Anti-Racism Concept Map & Essay
desc:
I need a polished, visually engaging concept map that illustrates how Anti-Racism connects to other Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion ideas, with particular emphasis on fostering healthy settings. The map must be produced as a digital illustration in Canva so I can easily edit colours, fonts, and layout later. If you normally work in Adobe Illustrator or Visio, that’s fine—just be ready to export the final file to Canva-friendly formats (PNG/SVG plus the original Canva link).

Alongside the graphic, prepare a 400–500-word explanatory essay that weaves at least three scholarly sources into a clear discussion of Anti-Racism. Please follow APA 7th edition for in-text citations and references. The explanation should touch on:  
• Anti-Racism within a healthy organisational or community setting  
• How this focus advances broader DEI goals  
• Key concepts or initiatives that link the two  

Deliverables  
1. Canva concept map (shareable Canva link + high-resolution PNG/SVG)  
2. 400–500-word APA-formatted essay (Word or Google Doc)  
3. Reference list in APA 7th edition  
4. NO AI OR CAHTGPT
5. 2018-2026 ARTICLES ONLY

Acceptance criteria  
• Concept map clearly shows the relationships between Anti-Racism, DEI, and a healthy setting  
• Essay falls between 400 and 500 words, cites at least three peer-reviewed sources, and is free of plagiarism  
• All files delivered before hand-in deadline, with fonts and graphics editable in Canva  

If everything above is clear, let’s get start

What I will provide:

* PDF plan links or bundled plan pages
* Color coding instructions

What you need to do:

1. Open the listed PDF plan sheets.
2. Find each room/area listed in the workbook.
3. Outline the room/area in PlanSwift or equivalent takeoff software.
4. Assign a color for each work item.
5. Enter the color used in the workbook.
6. Enter the measured quantity:

   * SF for floor areas
   * LF for wall base/containment/base items
7. Flag any room or item that cannot be found or is unclear.

Important requirements:

*

title: Joyful Romantic Free-Verse Poem
desc:
I’d like an original, heartfelt romantic poem written in free verse that radiates joy. The piece should feel genuine and uplifting—something that captures the exhilaration of love without slipping into cliché. 

Your creative voice is welcome, yet the final poem must:
• Maintain a clearly joyful tone from start to finish  
• Follow free-verse conventions (no strict meter or rhyme scheme)  
• Convey a romantic theme with vivid, emotionally resonant imagery  

A concise poem that lands between one and two printed pages is ideal, but I’m flexible if the flow calls for slightly more or less. Please deliver the poem as an editable text file (DOCX or Google Doc preferred) along with a brief note on your inspiration or approach.

I’ll review for originality, emotional impact, and how well the joyful atmosphere comes through. Let me know if you need any background details or a specific scenario to spark your creativity—otherwise, feel free to paint the scene you believe best expresses joyful romance.

title: Asistente Virtual Administrativo
desc:
Necesito apoyo remoto para mantener al día mis tareas administrativas. El trabajo principal será la gestión de correos electrónicos: clasificar, priorizar y responder mensajes siguiendo mis indicaciones para que la bandeja de entrada quede organizada cada día.

Aunque el enfoque inicial está en el correo, valoro la flexibilidad para, en el futuro, sumar organización de documentos o carga de datos si vemos que encaja con tu disponibilidad.

Requisitos esenciales:
• Dominio básico de Microsoft Office, especialmente Outlook y Excel.  
• Comunicación clara y responsable: espero actualizaciones breves sobre el progreso y cualquier duda que surja.  
• Puntualidad en los plazos acordados y atención al detalle.

Entregables:
1. Bandeja de entrada organizada y etiquetada según mis criterios.  
2. Resúmenes semanales del estado de los correos pendientes o resueltos.  
3. Registro sencillo en Excel con los mensajes relevantes y las acciones tomadas.

Si te sientes cómoda(o) con estas tareas y cumples los requisitos, me encantará colaborar contigo a largo plazo.

title: Hydropower Feasibility Study
desc:
I’m commissioning a focused feasibility study for a proposed hydropower installation. The core of the assignment is a thorough hydrological analysis built exclusively on the historical rainfall data I will provide.  

You’ll be expected to translate that rainfall record into reliable runoff estimations, reservoir yield curves, flow-duration curves, and ultimately an energy-generation profile that can feed into later economic and technical assessments. If you have access to additional datasets—such as river-flow gauging or groundwater levels—feel free to flag how they might refine the results, but they are not mandatory for this phase.  

Please deliver:  
• A concise methods section outlining software, models, and any statistical techniques used (e.g., HEC-HMS, SWAT, Python/Pandas).  
• All calculated hydrological parameters in spreadsheet form.  
• A short narrative report (≈10 pages) summarizing assumptions, key findings, data gaps, and recommended next steps.  

Accuracy, transparent assumptions, and clearly annotated calculations will be my acceptance criteria. I’m ready to share the rainfall dataset and site coordinates as soon as we agree on milestones.

title: Compile National SMS Supporter List
desc:
I need a fresh, permission-based SMS list that lets our nonprofit reach supporters across the entire country. Your job is to locate or generate valid U.S. mobile numbers belonging to individuals who are likely to be interested in our cause, and deliver them in a clean, well-structured spreadsheet ready for import into our messaging platform.

The list must be gathered through fully compliant, opt-in methods that respect TCPA and GDPR where applicable. I am open to approaches such as leveraging reputable data providers, opt-in landing pages, or partnerships with aligned organizations—what matters is that every number comes with documented consent and can be segmented by state for future targeting.

When you reply, outline:

• The exact data-collection or sourcing method you will use, including any tools, APIs, or third-party platforms.  
• How you will verify consent and maintain compliance.  
• The estimated total number of contacts you can deliver and your timeframe.

Deliverable: a CSV or Excel file containing phone numbers plus any supplementary fields you can lawfully capture (for example, name or email if available), accompanied by a brief report describing your process and proof of opt-in. I will review the first sample batch before green-lighting the full run.

title: Chinese Traditional Medicine & Daily Wellness Practices – Guide Adaptation
desc:
I have English material about Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) and everyday wellness practices. The original text is informative but written in a rather Western and academic style. I need it adapted into natural, clear, and culturally authentic Chinese that Chinese readers can easily relate to.
The guide covers basic TCM concepts, daily wellness habits, food therapy, simple exercises, and how Chinese people traditionally take care of their health in daily life.
What Needs to Be Done

Rewrite the full content into natural and easy-to-understand Chinese
Keep all TCM concepts and practical advice accurate
Make the language feel warm, practical, and culturally natural
Organize it as a clear and readable guide

Sample Task (include your version when you apply)
Please adapt the short English section below into natural Chinese. Show your adaptation in your proposal.
Original Section:
In Traditional Chinese Medicine, the body is seen as a system that needs balance. Many people start their day with warm water or light stretching to help the body wake up gently. Simple food choices, such as eating more warm and cooked meals, are also considered important for long-term health.
Deliverables

Full Chinese version of the guide (approximately 8–12 pages)
Natural and culturally appropriate Chinese throughout
Clean Word document

Quality Standards

The Chinese must feel natural and easy to read
All TCM concepts and advice must stay accurate
The tone should be practical and approachable, not

title: Craft Kombucha Café Kickstarter Campaign
desc:
I’m ready to launch a Kickstarter that will fund our move into a new, high-visibility kitchen where we can host demo dinners, workshops, cooking classes, and keep inventing probiotic-powered foods like scoby burgers, kombucha bread, scoby cheddar, crunchy sauerkraut crackers, and other scoby snacks.  

To make the campaign shine I need a creative partner who can handle three things from start to finish: shaping the page content, producing an eye-catching video, and structuring irresistible reward tiers. The tone throughout should feel casual and engaging so it speaks directly to food enthusiasts, health-conscious eaters, our local community, and anyone excited about hands-on cooking experiences.

Here’s what I’m looking for:  
• Campaign content creation – a compelling story, clear funding goal explanation, appetising product copy, and a short section about our upcoming third book.  
• Video production – concept, script, shot list or full editing (whatever level you specialise in) that captures our bubbling ferments, test-kitchen energy, and community vibe in 60-90 seconds.  
• Reward structuring – a tier plan that might include early bird class seats, limited demo-dinner invites, signed books, product bundles, or even naming a new scoby starter, all laid out so backers instantly get the value.  

If you’ve helped food brands or lifestyle projects smash crowdfunding goals before, even better. Share a couple of relevant links or quick case notes, tell me how you tackle each el

title: Android Credit Society Member App
desc:
I need a straightforward Android application that lets every member of our credit society log in securely and view their personal information—much like a mini-banking app but limited to our own data set. Each evening I will upload an updated Excel sheet; once that file is imported, the new figures must appear in the relevant member’s screen.  

Core data to show after login: account balance, full transaction history, current membership status, individual deposit details, and loan transactions. No other modules are required for this first release.

Because I will handle the data feed myself, the admin side only needs a simple interface where I can select and upload the latest Excel file; the system can overwrite yesterday’s entries and refresh the app immediately after the upload.

Deliverables  
• Native Android app (Kotlin or Java) with secure user authentication  
• Lightweight admin upload panel (web or in-app) that accepts the daily Excel file and maps its columns to the database  
• Local or cloud database to store and serve the member records efficiently  
• Basic material-style UI: dashboard, balance view, transactions list, and profile summary  
• Source code and brief deployment guide so I can build future versions internally  

Acceptance criteria  
1. Uploading a new Excel file manually updates all five data sections for every user without duplicates or mismatches.  
2. A test user account supplied by me shows identical figures in the app and in the Excel sheet I p

title: AI-Driven Instagram Promo Video Edit
desc:
I have raw footage (mobile-shot clips plus a few stills) and a clear message to push: drive interest in my product on Instagram. What I need now is a polished, eye-catching Reel, made stronger with smart AI touches—think automated captioning, adaptive color grading, object tracking for logo placement, or any other machine-learning trick that will stop the scroll.

Here’s the shape of the job:  
• Take my footage and craft a 30–60 s vertical (1080 × 1920) edit that feels native to Instagram Reels.  
• Apply AI-assisted enhancements where they add real value—dynamic subtitles, beat-synced cuts, background noise removal, subtle VFX, etc.  
• Keep the focus on the product: quick payoff, clear benefits, strong call-to-action at the end.  
• Deliver a master MP4 ready for upload, the editable project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve—your choice), and three still frames I can use as cover images.

Acceptance criteria  
1. Video stays within 30–60 s and the vertical 9:16 frame without pillarboxing.  
2. Audio is balanced, no clipping, music licensed (or royalty-free).  
3. Text overlays remain legible on both light and dark phones.  
4. Final file passes Instagram’s quality check when I upload.

When you reply, include a concise yet detailed project proposal outlining the AI tools or plugins you intend to use, your workflow, and a rough timeline. Links to a few similar edits are welcome but not mandatory—the proposal itself is what matters most to me.

title: Experienced YouTube Channel Manager Needed
desc:
Project: Faceless YouTube Channel Manager (Long-Term)
I'm looking for an experienced YouTube content creator or manager to help build and grow a faceless YouTube channel from scratch.
Responsibilities:
Research trending and evergreen video topics.
Write engaging, original scripts (8–12 minutes).
Edit professional, high-retention videos using copyright-safe footage, graphics, animations, music, and sound effects.
Create eye-catching thumbnails with high click-through potential.
Optimize titles, descriptions, tags, and SEO.
Upload videos and schedule them on YouTube.

Suggest ways to improve audience retention and channel growth using analytics.
Requirements:
Experience growing YouTube channels.
Portfolio of previous YouTube videos or channels you've worked on.
Strong understanding of YouTube SEO and audience retention.
Ability to produce high-quality content consistently.
Fluent English.
Comfortable using AI tools when appropriate while ensuring the final content is original and high quality.
Channel Goal:
Build a profitable faceless YouTube channel that can be monetized through YouTube ads and eventually expand into sponsorships and affiliate marketing.
Niche:
I'm open to recommendations, but I'm interested in niches with strong long-term earning potential and evergreen content.
Deliverables:
4–8 videos per month
One custom thumbnail per video
SEO optimization
Upload-ready files
Consistent communication and weekly progress

title: Suspense Short Film: Young Male Actors
desc:
I’m shooting a tight, 1–2-minute suspense sequence that takes place in a quiet suburban neighborhood. The setup is simple: a group of 18- to 25-year-old guys—who can convincingly pass for high-school students—climb into a parked van. They have no idea where they’re headed. As the van pulls away, a colorless sleeping gas begins to fill the cabin. One after another, the boys nod off while dramatic music swells. Fade to black. End of story.  

What I need from you  
• 4–6 male performers within the stated age range, comfortable on camera and able to play the slow “passing-out” beats believably.  
• A suburban exterior where the van can load up, plus interior coverage once we’re rolling.  
• Access to (or the ability to source) a plain passenger van that reads realistically on screen.  
• Basic production kit—HD camera, on-board or lav mics for incidental dialogue, and enough lighting to keep the cabin visible while we pump in the fog/smoke effect that will serve as the “gas.”  
• Post-production: a clean edit with royalty-free dramatic score, color correction, and delivered in 1080p MP4. No AI or animated elements; this has to be practical, live-action footage.  

I’m working with a total budget in the $100–$200 range, so please scale crew size and shoot time accordingly—think half-day, guerrilla style rather than a full studio setup.  

Send a quick reel or sample performance, confirm you can secure the van and suburban location, and outline how you’d handle the fog effect safe

title: Instagram Content Writer Needed -- 2
desc:
I need fresh, engaging text for my Instagram feed. Your task is to craft concise captions, hooks, and calls-to-action that match my brand voice, encourage interaction, and keep followers coming back.

Scope
• Write a batch of Instagram-ready captions (carousel, single image, Reel teasers) using trending but brand-appropriate language.  
• Suggest relevant hashtags and emoji placement for each post.

If you’ve grown accounts or written captions for lifestyle or e-commerce brands before, mention it and share samples or links. Let’s keep the timeline tight: initial draft within five days of hire.

title: White-Label Hosting Partner Needed for App Suite (No Store Accounts Available)
desc:
We are looking for a registered freelance agency or mobile development company that already possesses active Google Play Developer and Apple Developer Enterprise/Company accounts. We do not have our own accounts and require you to act as our "Publisher of Record" for our entire app ecosystem.

We have 3 Android apps (Customer, Vendor, Delivery Partner) and their corresponding 3 iOS apps (Total: 6 apps) ready for deployment. We need you to host these apps under your professional company account and manage the entire listing/submission process.

Scope of Work:

Hosting & Ownership (Store Side): You will upload and host these apps under your company’s name in both stores.

Store Setup: Create and optimize all store listings (metadata, descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and feature graphics).

Build Generation & Signing: Use your own signing keys to generate the final production builds (AAB/IPA) and sign them with your certificates.

Submission & Compliance: Submit all 6 apps to the stores and handle any rejections or policy inquiries directly with Apple/Google until they are live.

Handover (Crucial): Once the apps are live, you will grant us Admin/Manager access to the store dashboards so we can monitor analytics and eventually submit updates ourselves (or we will continue to hire you for updates).

title: Verbatim Transcription of English Audio
desc:
An English-language audio file needs to be rendered into a word-for-word transcript. Every utterance—filler words, repetitions, false starts, and meaningful pauses—must appear exactly as spoken, with no cleaning or summarising.  

Please work with any professional transcription tool you prefer (Express Scribe, oTranscribe, Descript, etc.) as long as the final text is accurate and faithfully mirrors the recording.

Deliverable  
• A single document (.docx, .txt, or Google Docs link) that captures the complete verbatim transcript, ready for review.  

I will provide the audio as soon as we start; just let me know the best format for you.

title: Commission-Only Digital Sales Closer
desc:
*YOU MUST HAVE AN EXCELLENT LEVEL OF SPOKEN ENGLISH*

We are a growing digital marketing agency that specialises in performance-driven paid social campaigns for medium-sized businesses. Demand for discovery calls is high and our calendar is filling up faster than we can close, so we need a proven closer who can step in immediately, build rapport with prospects and turn warm leads into signed retainers—entirely on a commission basis.

You’ll receive pre-qualified leads booked through our funnels, handle the sales calls (Zoom),  follow up, overcome objections and secure the agreement. We will supply case studies, service decks and pricing frameworks; you bring the confidence, consultative style and a track record of smashing revenue targets for agencies.

Because I want to move fast, please respond with a concise but detailed proposal outlining:
• Your closing process from first contact to contract  
• Relevant wins with medium-sized companies (numbers welcome)  
• The commission structure you require and any milestone preferences  

We are ready to onboard the right closer ASAP and can arrange a short introductory call within 24 hours to align on targets and tools (Go High Level, Teams, Google Workspace).

title: Residential Floor Plan Calculation Enhancements
desc:
I already have a full set of residential floor plans drafted; what is missing are the deeper technical layers that make them build-ready. I need every sheet updated to reflect three key aspects—land erosion assessment, heat-loss analysis, and wall-bracing requirements—and I want the underlying equations for each of those items laid out clearly.

Please overlay the new information directly on the drawings, using standard architectural/engineering notation, and include a separate calculation set that shows the formulas, assumptions, and step-by-step workings so a certifier can follow the logic without extra clarification.

Accepted formats for the drawings are DWG and PDF, and the calculations can be delivered in either Excel or a well-structured PDF. Accuracy must align with current residential code and typical soil, climate, and structural load factors.

Deliverables:  
• Updated plan files with erosion, heat-loss, and bracing call-outs  
• Companion calculation package covering all three topics  
• Short summary sheet referencing any codes or standards applied

I will supply the original plans immediately after award and be available for clarifications throughout the process so the final package is ready for submission straight away.

title: Real Estate Phone Lead Generator
desc:
I need a motivated ISA / virtual assistant who can jump on the phone and make at least 100 live dials a day to homeowners. The calls follow a brief survey script whose only purpose is to qualify leads for my licensed real-estate team; you will never present yourself as an agent or offer advice beyond the questionnaire.

You’ll receive the script, basic training, and a spreadsheet template. If you already have a system for building or cleaning calling lists, great—just be sure every contact is an owner in my target areas. Clear, easily understood English is a must, because these conversations are quick and rely on tone and clarity to keep prospects engaged.

Daily workflow and deliverables  
• 100+ homeowner dials per shift, Monday–Friday  
• Real-time notes captured in the shared sheet  
• Immediate hand-off of any motivated or time-sensitive leads  

When you submit your bid, simply outline your relevant experience with outbound calling or real-estate lead generation—tools used, average daily dial volume, and any measurable results. If reliability and a pleasant phone manner describe you, let’s talk and get the phones ringing.

title: Data entry operator  -- 2
desc:
I need a reliable specialist to search the web for accurate, up-to-date email addresses that match a set of target names and companies I will supply. This is pure online data research and entry: no scanning of paper documents, only internet sources such as LinkedIn, official company sites, press releases, and verified lookup tools.

You will enter every result into a Google Sheet I provide, keeping these columns exactly: Full Name, Company, Job Title (if available), Verified Email, Source URL, and Date Found. I’ll share a short Loom video that shows the sheet structure and validation rules so you can start immediately.

Acceptance criteria  
• 95 %+ of emails must pass verification in Hunter, NeverBounce, or a comparable checker.  
• No bounced or role-based addresses (info@, sales@).  
• Sheet is fully populated, free of duplicates, and ready for import.  

If you’ve handled contact-information research before and are comfortable working quickly while double-checking each entry, let’s get started—I’m ready to review a short sample within the first day and move on to the full list as soon as it’s approved.

title: Manual & Automated Web App Testing
desc:
I have a web application that is ready for a round of thorough quality assurance, and I want both manual exploration and automated coverage carried out. Your focus will be Google Chrome, since that is where the majority of my users work today, but a mindset that considers how findings might surface in other modern browsers is always welcome.

Here’s what I expect:

• Manual test sessions that probe core user flows, edge-cases, and any areas you believe deserve extra attention.  
• A lean but clear set of automated regression scripts—written in a popular framework such as Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright—that I can run locally and later hook into CI.  
• Well-structured bug reports and a concise summary of overall quality, with screenshots, console logs, or short videos where helpful.  
• Delivery of all source files, along with quick pointers on how to execute the automated suite.

I’ll provide credentials, staging URLs, and any domain context you need as soon as we start. Let me know what mix of tools you prefer and how quickly you can begin.

title: Multi-Asset Volatility Regime Model
desc:
Quant Developer — Volatility Forecasting & Regime Detection Model (Systematic Trading)

Project Overview

We run a systematic trading system with multiple signal sleeves, including trend-following and mean-reversion components. We're looking for a quantitative developer/researcher to build a shared volatility and regime-detection layer that feeds two things:


Position sizing — via a volatility forecast used to scale exposure.
Dynamic sleeve weighting — via a regime classifier that adjusts the relative allocation between our trend and mean-reversion sleeves based on the current market regime.


This is not a new alpha signal — it's infrastructure that sits underneath our existing signals and directly addresses a known risk: trend and mean-reversion sleeves tend to become dangerously correlated during strong trending regimes. We need a systematic way to detect that condition and de-weight accordingly, rather than running both sleeves at static weights.

Scope of Work

1. Volatility Forecasting Module


Implement and backtest a volatility estimator for use in position sizing. Open to your recommendation on approach, but candidates include:

Realized volatility (rolling, various windows)
EWMA (RiskMetrics-style)
GARCH-family models (GARCH, EGARCH, GJR-GARCH)



Compare methods on forecast accuracy and stability, not just in-sample fit.
Output: a clean, reusable vol forecast series per instrument, with clear documentation on lookback/parameter choices and how it should be consume

title: Write on Data Privacy & Digital Economy
desc:
ACADEMIC ESSAY ON DATA PRIVACY IN THE DIGITAL ECONOMY.
I am looking for an experienced academic writer to prepare a well-researched 1,000–1,500 word essay on the ethical and legal challenges surrounding the collection, storage, sharing, and commercial use of personal data in the digital economy. The essay should critically examine how businesses, digital platforms, governments, and other organisations use personal information, while addressing issues such as informed consent, surveillance, data breaches, algorithmic profiling, targeted advertising, consumer rights, corporate responsibility, and the effectiveness of current data protection laws. The work must have a clear academic structure, strong critical analysis, recent peer-reviewed and credible sources, accurate APA 7th edition citations, professional academic English, and a complete reference list. The final submission should be original, plagiarism-free, and delivered as an editable Microsoft Word document. Please include relevant academic writing samples, your experience in data privacy, law, information systems, ethics, or business, your proposed delivery time, and your total price.
SKILLS
-Critical Analysis.
- Data Analysis
-Report Writing
*****AI BIDS WILL BE DISQUALIFIED!!!!!

title: Digital Forensics Expert Needed -- 2
desc:
I'm seeking a skilled digital forensics expert to assist with my project.

- Recover data and find evidence.
- Prepare findings for legal purposes.

Ideal Skills:

Please provide past project examples and relevant certifications.

title: Onsite Operations Manager Needed - India - New Delhi
desc:
I’m looking for an experienced operations professional who can be physically present at our site each working day and take full ownership of daily activities. Your core mandate is straightforward yet critical: keep the operation running smoothly while steadily making it better.

What you’ll be doing  
• Oversee all day-to-day workflows, quickly removing roadblocks so the team can stay productive.  
• Manage discrete projects from kickoff through completion, coordinating people, timelines, and resources.  
• Spot bottlenecks or waste and drive process-improvement initiatives that raise efficiency and quality.

Essential skillset
