While supply-chain exposure is a plus, it isn’t mandatory; what matters most is your ability to keep operations humming and continuously higher-performing.

If you thrive in a hands-on environment and enjoy balancing immediate operational needs with longer-term optimisation projects, let’s talk.

Daily product and inventory data entry

title: PDF Re-Typing with Formatting
desc:
I have a short PDF—fewer than ten pages—that I need re-typed from scratch. All text should go into a Word document, while any tables or numeric sections belong in an Excel sheet. Accuracy is the top priority: spelling, punctuation, and line breaks must be flawless. Once you finish, I expect clean, ready-to-use files with no extra cleanup required on my end.

What I'm Looking For
I want a long-term partner who understands branding, communicates clearly, takes initiative, and can help grow the business—not just

• Identify and research suitable businesses
• Approach founders, business owners, directors, and authorised decision-makers
• Qualify genuine software or automation requirements
• Arrange 20-minute opportunity-review meetings
• Maintain clear outreach and follow-up records

Sparkify Social handles technical discovery, demonstrations, pricing, proposals, negotiation, contracts, development, and project delivery.

Compensation includes:

• 15% commission on collected project revenue
• 20% commission on the first collected payment if the first project converts within 14 days
• Commission paid within three business days after the relevant client payment clears
• 60-day protection for valid registered leads

Applicants should include their country, B2B sales experience, and the industries or decision-makers they can access.

This is an independent, non-exclusive engagement with no joining fee or technical-delivery responsibility. Any guaranteed Freelancer.com project payment must be agreed before awarding the project.

title: Classic Bold Business Card Design
desc:
I need a business card that feels timeless yet unmistakably vibrant. Think classic layout, balanced typography, and confident, bold colours that make the card stand out without drifting into anything too modern or minimalist.  

Please feature only the essentials I’ve selected—my name, job title, and complete contact information—arranged so they remain instantly readable at the standard 3.5" × 2" size. No logo is required this time, so you have freedom to play with colour accents and spacing to achieve that refined, traditional look.

Deliverables (print-ready):
• Front and, if you see fit, back design at 300 DPI, CMYK  
• 0.125" bleed and safe margins in place  
• Final PDF ready for the printer, plus the editable source file (AI or INDD)  

Acceptance criteria:
• Classic typography enhanced with bold colour touches  
• All text crystal-clear at actual size  
• Files open correctly with no missing fonts or links  

If you can supply two or three colour variations so I can pick a favourite, even better. I’m ready to move quickly once I see a concept that captures that classic-meets-bold balance.

title: Panduan Penghasilan Menulis Online
desc:
Saya ingin mulai menghasilkan uang lewat pekerjaan online di bidang penulisan konten. Saya membutuhkan panduan praktis dan mudah diikuti agar bisa segera mendapatkan proyek berbayar.  

Lingkup yang saya butuhkan:  
• Pemetaan langkah awal – cara membuat portofolio sederhana, profil yang menarik, dan contoh tulisan singkat.  
• Daftar minimal 10 platform freelance atau marketplace tempat penulis konten pemula bisa mendaftar, lengkap dengan cara bergabung dan kisaran tarif awal yang realistis.  
• Strategi mencari dan melamar proyek: kata kunci yang efektif, contoh proposal singkat, serta tips negosiasi harga.  
• Rekomendasi niche tulisan yang paling mudah dimonetisasi untuk pemula, misalnya artikel SEO dasar atau micro-copy.  
• Templat proposal dan invoice sederhana (format Word atau Google Docs).  

Format deliverable yang saya inginkan adalah dokumen panduan ringkas (maks. 15 halaman) beserta file templat terpisah.  

Fokuslah pada langkah konkret dan bahasa yang lugas; saya tidak memerlukan teori pemasaran panjang. Saya akan menilai pekerjaan berdasarkan kejelasan instruksi, kelengkapan daftar platform, dan kegunaan contoh proposal.

title: Digitize Notes in Custom Font
desc:
I have a stack of handwritten notes that need to be transcribed word-for-word and laid out in a very specific font I’ll supply. When finished, each page should look like it was freshly penned, but arrive to me as crisp, searchable PDFs.

Here’s the flow:
• I’ll forward high-resolution scans of the originals.  
• You accurately transcribe every word, preserving original line breaks, emphasis, and spacing.  
• Set the text in the custom handwriting font and export each page as its own PDF, plus one consolidated file.  

I’m flexible on the software you use—Word, InDesign, Google Docs—all fine so long as the PDF output is clean and the editable source file comes with it. The first batch is 20 pages and I’d like those back within three days; more pages will follow if we’re both happy.

Accuracy, an eye for formatting, and experience matching handwriting styles will be key. If that sounds like you, let’s get started.

title: VisualLearning App: Closed Android Testing
desc:
# Closed Testing Required for VisualLearning App (Android)

We are looking for Android users to participate in the **Closed Testing** phase of our educational app, **VisualLearning**.

### About the App

VisualLearning is an advanced learning platform designed for students of **Class 9th–12th**, **CBSE**, **State Boards**, **JEE**, and **NEET**. The app provides:

* 3D Animated Video Lectures
* Visual Notes
* NCERT Solutions
* Previous Year Questions (PYQs)
* MCQs & Quizzes

### Tester Requirements

* Android phone (Android 8.0 or above)
* Gmail account
* Ability to install the app from Google Play Closed Testing
* Use the app naturally for **14 days**
* Report any bugs, crashes, UI issues, or suggestions

### What You'll Do

* Install the app using the testing link.
* Explore different sections such as videos, notes, quizzes, and navigation.
* Verify login, course access, and overall performance.
* Share feedback regarding usability, performance, and any issues encountered.

### Deliverables

* Install and actively use the app during the testing period.
* Submit bug reports or improvement suggestions.
* Confirm successful testing after completion.

The purpose of this project is to gather real user feedback, improve app stability, and meet Google Play's closed testing requirements before the public release.

title: YouTube Content Creator & Editor
desc:
I run a set of personal YouTube channels and need a creative partner who can take each video from idea to final upload. This is strictly a personal project, not agency work, so you will be collaborating with me directly on concepts, style and publishing cadence.

Your role will cover topic research, scriptwriting, voice-over direction (where required) and full video editing for long-form, documentary-style pieces. I work heavily with ChatGPT and Claude for outlining and copy refinement, so confidence in prompt engineering is important. Strong Adobe Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve skills are a must, and any motion-graphics ability in After Effects is a bonus.

The workflow is remote and flexible; we can agree on part-time or full-time hours depending on your availability. For each assignment I expect:
• a researched outline with references,
• a complete script ready for my review,
• the edited video (1080p or 4 K, YouTube-ready, thumbnail included).

Send over a portfolio link or a sample that shows both storytelling and clean edits. If you have questions, feel free to message me before applying. Long-term collaboration is on the table for the right fit.

title: Voice Actors for Short Drama
desc:
I’m producing an English-language short drama and need emotionally charged performances from adult voices to carry the story. Every scene leans on nuance—subtle pauses, cracks in the voice, and genuine intensity—so I’m counting on you to inhabit the characters rather than simply read the lines.

The script is ready; once we agree on casting you’ll receive a marked-up PDF with character notes and timing cues. Record in a quiet environment using any professional DAW you prefer (Pro Tools, Audition, Reaper, Audacity, etc.) and export clean, broadcast-quality audio. Light processing—gentle noise reduction and basic leveling—is fine, but please leave enough headroom for final mixing.

Deliverables  
• Separate, clearly named files for each line or scene  
• Two distinct emotional takes per line to give me editing flexibility  
• WAV or high-bitrate MP3, 48 kHz/24-bit (or industry-standard equivalent)

I’ll review a short sample first to confirm tone and pacing, then we’ll lock in the full recording schedule. Let me know your native accent, any character range you’re keen to explore, and your typical turnaround time so we can move straight into production.

title: Data Table Transfer -- 2
desc:
I need hundreds of data tables lifted exactly as-is from a mix of public websites and existing spreadsheets and placed into a single, clean master sheet. Cell values, formulas (when present), column order and basic formatting have to come across intact so the resulting file can be sorted and analysed immediately—no missing rows, broken links or merged-cell surprises.

You will receive:
• A list of URLs and drive links that point to every source table.
• A template workbook that shows the target structure, tab naming convention and example rows.

Your job is straightforward:
1. Open each source in turn, copy the full table, and paste it into the matching tab of the template.
2. Check that numeric fields remain numeric, dates keep their format and text is not truncated.
3. Flag anything that will not copy neatly, such as hidden rows or protected ranges, so I can provide access or an alternate source.

Acceptance criteria
• All tables transferred, aligned with the template headers and free of extra blank rows.
• Spot checks on random tabs show 100 % data fidelity to the source.
• Final workbook opens without errors in both Excel and Google Sheets.

If you are meticulous with data and can turn this around quickly, let me know how soon you could complete it and any relevant project you've done that shows your accuracy.

title: Italian-Greek Medical Document Translation
desc:
I have two medical documents (2 pages) in PDF that must be translated from Italian into flawless, officially-recognized Greek (certified translator recognized by the Greek authorities). These files will be presented for strictly medical reasons, so absolute accuracy in terminology and adherence to any regulatory wording are critical.

I will supply the original PDFs; you return a clean, well-formatted Greek version along with any certification or sworn translator stamp required for the translation to be accepted by hospitals, clinics, or insurance providers. If you normally work in Word, feel free to convert the PDFs first, but the final delivery should include both the editable file and a print-ready PDF that mirrors the original layout.  

Because patient data is involved, I expect complete confidentiality and secure handling of the files. Familiarity with medical vocabulary—diagnoses, lab results, prescriptions, discharge summaries—is essential; I do not have time for revisions caused by terminology errors.  

Deliverables:  
• Certified Greek translation of each PDF (Word + PDF)  
• Signed statement or stamp confirming the translation’s official status  
• Consistent formatting that matches the source layout  

It is a time sensitive matter so a quick delivery time is preferred.

title: Private Label Product Research - Amazon France
desc:
Amazon France Private Label Product Research

I am looking for an experienced Amazon FBA Product Research expert.

My goal is to launch 2 Private Label products on Amazon France (Amazon.fr).

Please provide 3 unique product opportunities so I can choose the best 2.

This is a serious investment project with a budget of €8,000–€10,000, so I need professional, data-driven research using Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, SellerSprite, DataDive, or equivalent tools.

Do NOT use ChatGPT or AI-generated assumptions. Every claim must be supported by real marketplace data.

Product Requirements

Marketplace:
Amazon France

Categories:
Home & Kitchen
Home Organization
Home Improvement
Home Gadgets

Product must be:

Easy to manufacture
Easy to source from Alibaba
Easy to improve
Suitable for long-term brand building

Selling Price:
€25–€50

Demand:
Minimum 500 monthly sales
Preferred 700–1,500 monthly sales
Stable year-round demand

Competition:
Low to medium competition
Maximum 2–10 strong competitors

Profit:
Minimum 30–35% net profit margin AFTER Amazon fees and realistic PPC costs.

Do NOT recommend:
Electronics
Batteries
Food
Cosmetics
Supplements
Medical products
Baby products
Hazardous products
Fragile products
Oversized products
Highly regulated products
Patent-heavy products

Most Important Requirement

At least ONE product must be a true household necessity with consistent year-round demand.

Avoid:
Wedding products
Tr

title: Bilingual Fashion Promo Campaign Setup
desc:
I run an online clothing store that sells across India, so every piece of promotional content must flow naturally in both Hindi and English. The next four weeks are dedicated to a focused push on Facebook and Instagram, supported by a coordinated email sequence to our existing customer list.

Here’s what needs to happen:

• Social Content: A calendar of posts and Reels designed for Facebook and Instagram—copy written in smooth Hinglish, eye-catching visuals sized correctly for each platform, and clear CTAs that drive traffic straight to the product pages.  

• Paid Boosts: Ad-ready versions of the strongest posts with audience targeting suggestions, budgets broken down by day, and tracking UTM links prepared for our analytics dashboard.  

• Email Marketing: Three short campaign emails (announcement, reminder, last-chance) plus one reusable template. Each email should mirror the social message, include dynamic product blocks we can swap out, and display perfectly in mobile inboxes.

Success is simple to measure: engagement rates lift on both platforms, click-throughs from email surpass our current 4 % benchmark, and all files are delivered in editable formats (PSD or AI for creatives, DOCX or Google Docs for copy). If the content reads naturally to a bilingual shopper and the assets slot straight into our existing workflows, the job is complete.

title: 60-Second Cinematic AI Promo Ad
desc:
I need a single, 60-second cinematic video ad built largely with AI tools to showcase my Website and its theme. The spot must look studio-grade: think dramatic lighting, fluid camera moves, tight editing, emotive sound design, and a clear call-to-action in the final frames.  

You’re free to pull from Runway, Stable Diffusion, Midjourney, After Effects, Premiere, or any other AI/creative suite you trust, so long as the finished piece feels cohesive and premium. Because this is a promotion piece, product shots (real or AI-enhanced), brand colours, and on-screen copy will need to be integrated naturally.  

Timing is critical—I’d like the first rough cut on my desk as soon as possible, with rapid turnaround on any tweaks so we can launch without delay.  

Deliverables  
• Final 60-second ad in 16:9, 1080p and 4K MP4  
• All project/source files and AI assets used  
• One round of revisions included to lock picture and audio  

If that scope and deadline work for you, let’s get started today.

title: Legal Experts
desc:
Job Description
As a legal expert, you'll help train and evaluate how AI models reason about the law. This can be writing challenging legal prompts, evaluating model responses for accuracy and sound reasoning, spotting subtle errors like fabricated citations or misapplied rules, drafting model answers and explanations, or creating rubrics to grade response quality.

title: Smart Wall-Mounted Vending Kiosk
desc:
I’m developing Wendz, an ultra-slim, wall-mounted vending kiosk that also serves third-party advertisements on a 4 K screen. The unit will pair that display with a 10-inch touchscreen for product selection, a four-slot spiral vend mechanism, UPI/NFC payments, 5 G/LTE connectivity, a full sensor suite for health, security and usage, active cooling for true 24/7 operation, plus an emergency stop that triggers a cloud-based escalation flow.  

The brief covers the entire journey: mechanical, electronics and firmware design, through to a deployable pilot and a first run of roughly ten identical machines, complete with bill of materials, assembly documentation and field support. Time is critical—I want to move now and see the first working unit on-site as soon as possible. Bengaluru collaboration is ideal, but I’ll prioritise depth of kiosks, vending or IoT hardware experience anywhere.

Deliverables  
• End-to-end design package (CAD, schematics, firmware, cloud integration) ready for compliance testing  
• One fully functional, wall-mountable pilot meeting every spec above  
• Repeatable BOM and build instructions enabling a short run of ten units  
• Fabrication, assembly and validation of that initial batch  
• Post-deployment support to resolve any field issues during early rollout

Acceptance will be based on on-site testing of every core function—advertising playback, vend-on-touch, cashless payment, sensor reporting, remote health monitoring and emergency-stop escalation—o

title: Konten TikTok Channel WhatsApp
desc:
Saya ingin meningkatkan visibilitas channel WhatsApp saya (tautan di atas) dengan rangkaian konten TikTok yang menarik dan konsisten. Fokus saya sederhana: buat konten yang mampu menggaet penonton TikTok lalu mengarahkan mereka bergabung ke channel WhatsApp tersebut.

Apa yang saya butuhkan:
• 5–7 ide video pendek per minggu lengkap dengan konsep singkat, skrip, hook, dan call-to-action yang mendorong klik tautan channel.  
• Saran audio, efek, atau tren TikTok yang sedang naik daun agar konten terasa relevan.  
• Caption singkat beserta hashtag yang sesuai niche dan audiens Indonesia.  
• Petunjuk visual (mood board atau referensi shot) sehingga proses produksi menjadi mudah—saya akan merekam videonya sendiri.  

Harapan hasil:
• Ide harus fresh, ringan, dan mudah direalisasikan hanya dengan kamera ponsel.  
• Gaya bahasa tetap santai tetapi persuasif sehingga penonton merasa FOMO jika tidak join channel.  
• Semua materi dikirim dalam satu dokumen terstruktur (Google Docs atau PDF) lengkap dengan urutan posting harian.  

Jika kamu memahami algoritma TikTok, mengetahui cara menulis hook kuat di 3 detik pertama, dan familiar dengan strategi funnel ke WhatsApp, saya menunggu konsep kreatifmu.

title: European Safari Booking Agent -- 2
desc:
I run Ejas Africa Adventures, a registered tour operator offering safari experiences across Tanzania and Kenya. I want to partner with a Europe-based freelance sales agent who can grow our presence on that market on a pure commission basis, paid immediately after each booking is confirmed with us.

Your main focus will be safari tours: answering enquiries that come in from European prospects, nurturing them into firm reservations, and actively promoting our packages through the channels you know best—social media, travel forums, email campaigns, or your own network. I will supply up-to-date rate sheets, day-by-day itineraries, high-quality images and video, plus fast WhatsApp support from our operations team in Arusha and Nairobi so you always have the latest availability.

Key expectations  
• Timely, friendly handling of all customer questions until they convert.  
• Ongoing marketing and promotion in your market to keep a steady flow of qualified leads.  
• Accurate relay of client details to us so we can issue invoices and final confirmations; commission released immediately after that step.  

If you already sell safari trips, have a following of adventure-travel enthusiasts, or simply love East Africa and want to monetise your network, let’s talk.

title: Comprehensive Accounting & Compliance Management
desc:
I am responsible for managing the complete accounting, finance, taxation, and statutory compliance functions of RA Enterprises. My role involves maintaining accurate books of accounts, recording day-to-day financial transactions, managing accounts payable and receivable, preparing invoices, processing vendor and customer payments, and performing bank and ledger reconciliations to ensure financial accuracy.

I handle GST-related activities, including GST registration, invoice verification, input tax credit (ITC) reconciliation, preparation and filing of GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-9, and other applicable returns. I also manage TDS compliance by calculating tax deductions, filing TDS returns, issuing TDS certificates, and ensuring timely payment of taxes.

In addition, I oversee payroll processing, employee reimbursements, professional tax, PF, ESIC, and other statutory compliances wherever applicable. I prepare monthly MIS reports, financial statements, profit and loss accounts, balance sheets, cash flow reports, and various management reports to support business decision-making.

My responsibilities also include fixed asset accounting, depreciation calculations, inventory accounting, expense analysis, budgeting support, and coordination with statutory auditors, tax consultants, banks, and government authorities. I ensure timely compliance with Income Tax, GST, ROC, LLP, and other regulatory requirements while maintaining proper documentation and audit-ready records.

I am proficien

title: प्राइमरी हिन्दी टाइपिंग कार्य   अ आ इ ई उ ऊ ऋ ए ऐ ओ औ अँ  अः क ख ग घ ङ च छ ज झ  ट ठ ड ढ ण त थ द ध न प फ ब  भ  म य र ल श स ष ह क्ष त्र ज्ञ -- 2
desc:
मुझे कक्षा 1 से 4 के विद्यार्थियों के लिए हिन्दी विषय की सामग्री टाइप करवानी है। पूरा काम केवल हिन्दी में और Unicode फॉन्ट में चाहिए, ताकि फाइलें आसानी से साझा व संशोधित की जा सकें। मैं पाठ-पुस्तकों व कार्यपत्रों के स्कैन या हाथ से लिखे नोट्स दूँगा; आपको उन्हें शुद्ध, बिना वर्तनी-त्रुटि के डिजिटल फ़ॉर्मेट (MS Word या Google Docs) में टाइप करना होगा।  

मुख्य बिंदु  
• सारी टाइपिंग केवल Unicode फॉन्ट में  
• भाषा स्तर कक्षा 1-4 के अनुरूप रहे  
• त्रुटि-रहित व फॉर्मेटिंग साफ़–सुथरी हो  
• डिलीवरी: प्रतिदिन प्रगति अपडेट और अंतिम फ़ाइल DOC या DOCX  

अगर आपके पास प्राथमिक कक्षा की सामग्री टाइप करने का अनुभव है, तो काम जल्दी समझ में आएगा। संदेश भेजते समय बताएँ कि प्रतिदिन लगभग कितने पन्ने टाइप कर सकते हैं और उदाहरण दिखाएँ, यदि उपलब्ध हों।

title: Logo Minimalis Brand A
desc:
Saya membutuhkan logo sederhana dan clean untuk Brand A dengan nuansa warna merah dan gaya minimalis. 

Ruang lingkup:
• Dua konsep awal—boleh dibuat di Canva atau aplikasi sejenis—yang langsung menonjolkan kesederhanaan dan profesionalitas.  
• Revisi tanpa batas sampai desain terasa pas.  
• File final berupa PNG transparan, JPG, dan PDF beresolusi tinggi.  
• Mock-up logo di kemasan sebagai bonus sangat dihargai.  

Harapannya, seluruh proses selesai dalam 1 hari setelah konsep disepakati. Silakan lampirkan portofolio atau contoh karya serupa agar saya dapat menilai kecocokan gaya Anda. Terima kasih!

title: Draft Divorce Settlement Order
desc:
I need a professionally drafted divorce settlement order that the court can adopt without major revisions. The document must set out the full division of assets and clearly spell out how our real-estate holdings and joint financial accounts are to be allocated.  

I will supply the relevant case caption, docket number, jurisdiction, and the agreed-upon percentages for each asset; you turn that information into a clean, court-ready order that follows standard family-law formatting and cites any statutes or rules that the clerk will expect to see.

Deliverables  
• A finalized, sign-and-file PDF formatted to the court’s requirements  
• An editable Word copy for future amendments  

Accuracy and clarity are crucial—please ensure every section is self-contained and unambiguous so the judge can sign without modification.

title: Daily Cartoon 3D Character Animation
desc:
I’ve got a steady stream of short scripts arriving every day and I need someone who can turn each one into a lively 3D cartoon-style character animation. Every script lays out the action, timing, and any camera notes, so you’ll always have clear direction from the start.

Here’s how I see the workflow: I forward the script, we agree on length and any quick visual references, and you jump straight into modeling (if new characters are required) or rigging and animating the existing ones in your preferred 3D package—Blender, Maya, Cinema 4D, or similar. Because the tone is fully cartoon, I’m after squash-and-stretch, expressive facial work, and playful timing rather than photoreal detail. No voice-over is needed, so feel free to let the visuals do all the talking.

Typical Deliverables  
• Final 1080p (or higher) video file in .mp4 or .mov  
• Project source files (blend/ma/c4d, textures, rigs) so I can archive or tweak if needed  
• One thumbnail or still frame for each animation, suitable for social posting

Acceptance Criteria  
• Matches the narrative beats and timing in my script  
• Consistent cartoon aesthetic across episodes  
• Clean rigs and organized project files for future reuse

Turnaround is usually one to three days per script, so reliability is key. If you thrive on fast, fun character work and can keep quality high under a rolling schedule, let’s chat and start animating!

title: Short-Term Tech Call Campaign
desc:
I have a time-boxed campaign promoting our latest software solutions to universities and technical colleges and I need a confident voice to drive the first touch. Your single goal is to pick up the phone, hold a clear, engaging conversation and walk away with a confirmed meeting on my calendar—no hard-selling, no closing quotas, just quality conversations that lead to booked demos.

Here’s what the assignment looks like: you’ll work from a targeted contact list and a concise value-focused script. During each call you’ll qualify the prospect, handle basic objections and secure a convenient slot for a 30-minute discovery session with one of our product specialists. I’ll give you access to our cloud CRM (Salesforce) so you can log call notes and meeting details in real time; if you already prefer HubSpot or Zoho, let me know and I can export in your format.

Because this is short-term, I care about fast ramp-up: excellent spoken English, a professional headset, and the confidence to speak with deans, IT directors and procurement officers are non-negotiable. You choose your own calling hours as long as they align with the prospect’s business day, and we pay promptly per productive hour.

Deliverables I’ll review at close of each shift:  
• Updated CRM record for every dialed contact  
• Calendar invite sent for each scheduled meeting  
• Brief call summary highlighting objections or product questions that surfaced  

If you’re ready to put your communication skills to work and en

title: Avaya Infrastructure Specialist Required Remotely
desc:
Remote Avaya Infrastructure Systems Specialist

Network Infrastructure: Strong proficiency in SIP protocol debugging, TLS certificate handlin

title: Ecommerce & Digital Marketing Specialist Required
desc:
Digital Marketing & Ecommerce Specialist (On-Site – DHA/Clifton, Karachi)

Project Type: Full-Time, On-Site
Location: DHA/Clifton, Karachi, Pakistan

We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Digital Marketing & Ecommerce Specialist to join our growing team in Karachi. This is an on-site position for someone passionate about ecommerce, digital marketing, and building successful online brands.

* Proven experience with Dropshipping

title: Resource Needed for an IT company based in Delhi(India)
desc:
I’m looking for an experienced operations professional who can be physically present in our office each working day and take full ownership of daily activities. Your core mandate is straightforward yet critical: keep the operation running smoothly while steadily making it better.

What you’ll be doing  
• Oversee all day-to-day workflows, quickly removing roadblocks so the team can stay productive.  
• Manage discrete projects from kickoff through completion, coordinating people, timelines, and resources.  
• Spot bottlenecks or waste and drive process-improvement initiatives that raise efficiency and quality.

Essential skillset  
• Team management – you know how to motivate, coach, and hold people accountable.

title: Facebook Lead Generation Ads
desc:
The goal is straightforward: collect qualified leads through a tightly-focused Facebook Ads campaign. I need the full funnel built and optimised—from audience definition to tracking and weekly tweaks—so I can concentrate on converting the enquiries that come in.  

Objective  
The campaign must run on the Lead Generation objective inside Meta Ads Manager, using Instant Forms for a seamless, on-platform experience that keeps cost per lead low.  

Audience Strategy  
Targeting will rely on interests and behaviours, with a strong emphasis on purchasing behaviour signals that indicate buying intent. I will supply a brief on my product and any existing customer insights; you’ll translate that into laser-focused ad sets.  

Creative & Copy  
Three to four static images or short videos plus matched primary text and headlines are expected. All assets should be tailored to the purchasing-behaviour segment you build.  

Tracking & Reporting  
Meta Pixel and Conversion API already sit on the site; you’ll verify they fire correctly, set up custom events if needed, and create a reporting view that highlights volume, CPL and lead quality indicators.

• Campaign structure inside my Business Manager (ad sets, ads, Instant Form)

• Ads approved and live

Successful work will be measured by steady growth in meaningful interactions—comment threads that keep moving, DMs that convert to leads, and an overall uplift in engagement percentages across all three channels. If you have an eye for design, a knack for witty captions and the agility to tweak strategy based on analytics, let’s get started.

title: TM59 Overheating Risk Assessments
desc:
I need full TM59 overheating risk assessments for three new-build bungalows. You may work in either DesignBuilder or IES—whichever you are most efficient with—as long as the final output meets CIBSE TM59 compliance requirements.

Dwellings are for Social Housing so 100mm max openings, dMEV for the Ventialtion

title: Modelo Off-Design Turbofán Trieje Flujo mezclado MATLAB

Entrego el código on-design, el esquema off-design inicial y la bibliografía necesaria en cuanto inicies.

title: PyTorch/CUDA Expert for Audio AI Pipeline
desc:
Job Description:

    I'm running a self-hosted, real-time conversational voice AI pipeline (STT → LLM → streaming TTS over WebSocket) on a RunPod GPU pod (CSM-1B TTS model, using the
    davidbrowne17/csm-streaming fork with Sesame's Mimi/moshi audio codec, PyTorch torch.compile). I need an experienced PyTorch/CUDA engineer to find and fix a reproducible latency
    bug that's blocking production readiness.

    The problem:
    At sentence/turn boundaries in a multi-turn conversation, generation stalls for ~7-8 seconds of dead air. I've already localized this precisely via wall-clock instrumentation: the
    stall occurs specifically inside Mimi's audio_tokenizer.encode() call, when encoding a previous turn's generated audio into context — and specifically only when encoding an audio
    length/shape the process hasn't seen before (repeat lengths are ~12ms; new lengths cost ~7-8s, every time).

    What's already been ruled out (to save you time re-testing these):
    - torch.compile(mode='reduce-overhead') vs mode='default' — switched to default, no change
    - moshi's internal CUDAGraphed wrapper — disabled via no_cuda_graph() around both the generation loop and the context-tokenization loop — no change
    - moshi's torch_compile_lazy decorator — disabled via NO_TORCH_COMPILE=1 — no change
    - torch._dynamo.config.cache_size_limit (default 8) — raised to 256 — no change
    - Shape bucketing/padding to fixed sizes — implemented, not conclusively re-validated after a r

title: Sand Casting Gating Simulation
desc:

The goal is to visualise metal flow from the pouring basin through the sprue and runner network, identify turbulence pockets, pressure drops and temperature gradients, then recommend geometry or process tweaks that will cut defects before we cut tooling.

What I will provide:
• Alloy and pouring data (temperature, flow rate, mould properties)

What I expect back:
• The ANSYS project file with all boundary conditions, material libraries and meshing set up so I can rerun it in Workbench  
• A concise report (screenshots, plots, short commentary) pinpointing flow problems and suggesting practical changes to improve yield and surface integrity  
• Any scripts or user-defined functions used in the study

I am comfortable reviewing iterative results, so feel free to stage the work: first a quick baseline run, then refinements after we discuss the findings.

title: Analisis Data Teks Terstruktur -- 2

title: Custom Trading Indie Script
desc:
I’m working exclusively with stocks and need a small, focused script that runs technical analysis for me. The only feature I care about at this stage is:  
• Technical analysis tools – specifically my preferred indicator, “Indie.”  

Indie is a technical analysis-oriented programming language and runtime for developing indicators for the TakeProfit platform. All built-in indicators on the platform are implemented in Indie, and TakeProfit has integrated IDE tools that allow users to create their own indicators.

Indie is a dialect of Python and is essentially a subset of Python language constructs, with added syntactic sugar in the form of decorators (such as @indicator or @algorithm) and a few differences in semantics.

Clean, well-commented code is essential. Python would be ideal because I can run it locally, but I’m open to Pine Script, ThinkScript, or another mainstream language if you can replicate the same logic.  

Deliverables  
• Source code implementing the Indie indicator  
• Brief user guide covering setup, parameters, and how to interpret signals  
• One sample run on a stock ticker that demonstrates the output  

Please tell me which language you suggest, how long you’ll need, and any questions you have so we can get started quickly.

title: Industrial Automation Embedded PCB Design
desc:
This project centres on a compact embedded platform that will sit inside an industrial automation cabinet and take charge of continuous monitoring and control. At its core the board must read an oxygen sensor, process the signal locally, apply any calibration curves, and then drive a pair of digital outputs that feed the plant’s PLC. A small TFT or OLED status screen and a Modbus-RTU port over RS-485 will round out the human-machine and network interfaces.

I will provide the exact sensor datasheet, operating ranges, and the enclosure footprint; you handle everything from component selection to fully-routed Gerber files and production-ready firmware.

Key deliverables  
• Schematic capture and multilayer PCB layout (KiCad or Altium) matching my mechanical constraints  
• BOM with second-source options for all active parts  
• Firmware (C/C++ on STM32 or equivalent) that:  
 – Reads the oxygen sensor via the recommended analogue front end  
 – Filters and linearises the signal in real time  
 – Publishes the value over Modbus registers  
 – Drives two digital outputs based on user-defined thresholds stored in EEPROM  
• A short build & flash guide plus test procedure I can repeat on the bench

Acceptance criteria  
1. Board passes a smoke test at 24 Vdc and draws less than 150 mA idle.  
2. Sensor reading on the display matches my reference meter within ±2 %.  
3. Modbus tool sees stable data at 9600 N 8 1 with no frame errors during a 12-hour soak.  
4. All manufacturing file

title: Manufacturing Operations Efficiency Dashboard
desc:
Our manufacturing arm captures plenty of shop-floor and ERP data, yet most of it sits unused. I want that information converted into a clear story focused on operational efficiency. The core of the assignment is to analyse our manufacturing data and surface three critical metrics—production yield, machine downtime, and inventory levels—within an intuitive management dashboard.  

Here is how I see the flow of work:

• Data preparation: connect to and clean raw production logs, maintenance records, and stock files (SQL, Excel, or CSV).  
• Modelling & analysis: calculate run-rate KPIs, variance against targets, and trend lines that highlight bottlenecks.  
• Visual delivery: build an interactive dashboard (Power BI, Tableau, or a similarly robust tool) that executives can slice by line, shift, or date.  
• Automation: schedule daily or weekly email or PDF reports straight from the system so key stakeholders stay informed without manual effort.  
• Insight hand-off: translate the numbers into plain-language recommendations I can act on, supported by concise documentation of the data model and calculations.

Success is a dashboard that my leadership team can open and immediately understand where efficiency is lost, why, and what to fix first. If you have a strong MIS mindset and enjoy turning raw data into actionable insights, let’s get started.

No pricing talk, no long sales cycle—just a clear, direct invitation that ends with “Yes, send me a calendar invite.”

If you enjoy rapid-fire phone work and can start tomorrow, let’s move forward—I’ll provide the full contact sheet and access to our calendar right away.

title: Architectural Plot Layout Drafting
desc:
I need a clean, clearly-readable architectural plotting layout of 125, 100 sq yard s prepared from plot layout of 57372 sq yards . The drawing should be ready for printing as a master plan(internal roads , external roads , park , commercial ) as well as for digital circulation to local authorities, so accuracy and tidy layer management in AutoCAD (or compatible software) are essential.  

The end product I’m expecting is:  
• A fully annotated site layout in DWG and PDF formats  
• Line-weights and hatch patterns optimised for a single-sheet print (A1 size)  
• A legend, north arrow, and title block completed with the project data I’ll supply  

I have not fixed the plotting scale yet; please propose the most suitable option—typically 1:100, 1:200, or 1:500—once you have reviewed the site extents. If you spot any missing dimensions or coordinates, flag them early so I can clarify before you finalise the file.  

Fast turnaround and attention to drafting standards will be highly valued, as I want to move this layout straight into the approval phase once complete.

title: Naval Vessel CAD, Seakeeping & Maneuvering
desc:
I need a detailed 3-D CAD model of a naval vessel that captures the hull form and propulsion layout accurately enough to feed into hydrodynamic analysis software. Once the geometry is approved, I also want a full suite of seakeeping and maneuvering studies:

• Seakeeping: stability analysis, wave-resistance predictions, and motion-response curves in regular and irregular seas.  
• Maneuvering: turning circle, zig-zag, and stopping analyses so I can benchmark agility against current NATO criteria.

The workflow I have in mind is straightforward. First, produce the parametric hull and propulsion geometry in a neutral file format (IGES or STEP) along with native files from Rhino, SolidWorks, or a comparable naval-architecture tool. When the geometry passes my visual and hydrostatic checks, run CFD or potential-flow calculations in software such as MAXSURF, ANSYS Aqwa, OpenFOAM, or your own validated in-house code. Present the results in a concise report that includes plots, tabulated data, and a short interpretation of what the numbers mean for real-world performance.

Acceptance criteria
1. CAD files are watertight, fair, and import directly into my CFD package without repair.  
2. Hydrostatic particulars (displacement, LCB, KM, etc.) match the target values I will provide to within ±2 %.  
3. Seakeeping outputs list RAOs, added resistance, and GM variation over the stated sea spectrum with clear graphs.  
4. Maneuvering study includes time histories and trajectory plots for ea

title: SLS Process Optimization Simulation of a Composite CF-PA11
desc:
I need a COMSOL Multiphysics specialist (AND/OR Digimat AM) who can help me streamline a selective laser-sintering (SLS) workflow. The focus is squarely on boosting efficiency and speed rather than redesigning the part or inventing a new material. I already run Digimat for micro-mechanical insight, so your COMSOL model should interface smoothly with—or at least accommodate—Digimat data.

Scope of work  
• Build or refine a multiphysics model that captures the thermal, mechanical and phase-change behaviour of composite CF-PA11 during SLS.  
• Calibrate it with any lab or literature parameters you recommend so the results remain physically meaningful.  
• Run parametric sweeps on laser power, scan speed, hatch spacing and layer thickness, then identify the best window that shortens cycle time without compromising density or surface finish.  
• Summarise findings in a short report and leave me with a ready-to-run COMSOL file, plus clear notes on how to adjust inputs for future builds.

Acceptance criteria  
– COMSOL file opens without missing definitions or link errors.
– Simulation predicts part temperature profile and porosity trends within ±10 % of reference data I will provide.  
– Report lists the optimal parameter set and shows at least a 15 % improvement in build time compared with my current baseline.

If you have already coupled Digimat and COMSOL or have insights on selective laser sintering heat-transfer models, please mention it when you respond.

Your task is t

title: Suppress Unwanted Article on Google

Here’s where I stand right now:

What I’d like from you:  
1. A step-by-step suppression strategy covering SEO techniques, content marketing angles and social media tactics, complete with an execution timeline.  
2. Keyword research that pinpoints what we should target to displace the article for each key search phrase.  
3. An implementation roadmap that shows exactly where and how often to publish—on our site, on guest domains you recommend, and on any other channels that will help.  
4. Metrics and reporting guidelines so we can track movement in the rankings and adjust quickly if needed.  

If you have experience pushing negative or unwanted content off page one in a transparent, white-hat manner, I’d love to review case studies or brief success summaries. Let’s talk about your plan t

title: STM32 Industrial Sensor Hardware Design
desc:
I need a robust hardware platform built around an STM32 MCU that can sit inside a power-plant environment, pull data from existing equipment over RS-232 and RS-485, and forward it through a Quectel EC200 LTE module using an eSIM. The board must work off mains power yet seamlessly fall back to an internal battery when the line drops, so the power-supply stage needs both an AC/DC front end and a battery-charging circuit with automatic switchover.

Core requirements  
• Schematic and routed PCB (Altium, KiCad or similar) incorporating STM32 + EC200 + eSIM socket  
• Galvanically-isolated RS-232 and RS-485 transceivers suitable for industrial noise levels  
• Wide-temperature components and protection for surge, reverse polarity and ESD  
• On-board power path management for dual supply (mains & battery) with status monitoring pins

Deliverables  
1. Complete schematic files, PCB gerbers, pick-and-place and 3D step files  
2. Well-annotated BOM with manufacturer part numbers and second sources where practical  
3. Brief hardware bring-up guide describing test points and firmware loader access

Acceptance criteria  
• Board boots the STM32 and registers the EC200 on an LTE network via eSIM in the lab  
• RS-232/485 ports pass loop-back and 1 kV surge tests without data loss  
• Switchover to battery occurs with <50 ms interruption at 500 mA load

If you have shipped similar industrial designs, especially with STM32 and Quectel radios, I’d like to see a quick portfolio snippet alon

Acceptance criteria

2. Health metrics show no dropped events over a 24-hour stress test.  
3. At least five actionable correlation rules fire during simulated incidents.  
4. Documentation is complete and reviewed by us before sign-off.

If you have recent success stories standing up QRadar in mixed cloud/on-prem environments and can start soon, let’s discuss timelines and any p

title: Catamaran Drawings & 3D Model
desc:

title: Bibliometria Scopus com Redação de Capítulo
desc:
Preciso transformar uma ideia inicial numa análise bibliométrica sólida que servirá como capítulo de 8 – 15 páginas.

Escopo do trabalho
1. Construir e refinar a string de busca no Scopus e na Web of Science.  
   • Objetivo principal: avaliar a produção científica.  
   • Critério usado: palavras-chave (trago algumas sugestões, mas conto com você para ajustá-las e completá-las).  

2. Exportar e limpar os registros obtidos, eliminando duplicatas e campos irrelevantes, deixando a base pronta para análise.

3. Rodar as análises no VOSviewer, gerando mapas de coautoria, cocitação ou co-ocorrência conforme a pertinência, e interpretar os resultados de forma crítica.

4. Redigir um texto inicial estruturado (8 a 15 páginas, fonte 12, espaço 1,5) que inclua:  
   • metodologia de busca e critérios adotados;  
   • descrição do processo de limpeza de dados;  
   • discussão dos mapas gerados;  
   • principais achados sobre a produção científica do tema.

Entrega esperada
• Arquivo com a string final otimizada.  
• Planilha limpa (.xlsx ou .csv).  
• Arquivos do VOSviewer e capturas/figuras dos mapas.  
• Documento Word ou Google Docs com o capítulo preliminar.

Valorizo comunicação clara, transparência no passo a passo e referências corretas. Caso domine outras ferramentas de visualização, sinta-se à vontade para sugerir.

Deadline: 30 days for presenting initial results and an additional 15 days for final delivery.

title: Flexible Business Support Opportunity
desc:

The role is intentionally broad because the needs that pop up can shift from week to week—one day it may be light inbox management, the next it could be updating a simple spreadsheet, placing follow-up calls, or posting a prepared update on social media. None of the tasks are technically complex; what matters is consistency, clear communication, and a willingness to step in where needed.

I am offering a generous, stable pay structure because I value reliability and long-term collaboration over one-off gigs. Time-zone overlap is helpful but not mandatory; as long as deadlines are met and messages are answered promptly, you can work when you’re most productive.

To move forward, send a brief note outlining:

I review every application personally and respond quickly, so feel free to reach out with any questions. Looking forward to seeing how we might succeed together.

title: Scopus Journal Submission Support
desc:
My manuscript is complete and ready for a Scopus-indexed journal; what I need now is an experienced hand to shepherd it through the entire submission pipeline. I already have the journal’s official author guidelines (layout, citation style, figure specs, word limits) and can forward the PDF immediately.

Here’s what I expect, in clear stages: 
  Editing and Proofreading 
• Precise re-formatting of the manuscript, references, tables and figures so every item matches the journal’s template and style sheet (Word or LaTeX—whichever you prefer).  
• Uploading the files through the journal’s online system (e.g., ScholarOne, Editorial Manager), including completing all metadata, cover letter, highlights and any supplementary material.  
• Ongoing management of editorial correspondence: prompt, well-reasoned responses to reviewer comments, tracked-change revisions, and a tidy resubmission package until an “accept” decision is reached.

Files will be shared via Google Drive; all change-tracked versions must remain visible. I’ll be available for scientific clarifications, but I’m counting on you for flawless presentation, punctual resubmissions and professional tone in every message.

Deliverables are accepted once the manuscript clears peer review without further formatting queries from the editorial office.

title: 3-D Model Design for Commemorative Coin
desc:
I need a precise 3-D model of a commemorative coin that can go straight to a CNC mill. The finished piece must measure exactly 1.500" in diameter and 0.090" thick, with both faces carrying shallow, machine-friendly embossments.

Face A will feature a peach. I am after moderate details—enough to capture the familiar emoji-like curves and a hint of texture without venturing into photorealism that would complicate machining.

Face B presents a palace. Again, moderate detail is ideal: clear architectural outlines, distinguishable roofs and towers, but nothing so intricate that a standard ball-nose cutter couldn’t reproduce it. I’m flexible on artistic style here, provided the result mills cleanly and reads instantly as a palace.

I have images of some concepts that I liked if reference material would be helpful.

All edges, relief depths and radii must respect typical CNC constraints (no undercuts, sensible draft angles). Please keep the highest relief within about 0.015" so we maintain the overall thickness.

Preferred tools are SolidWorks, Autodesk Inventor or any CAD package that outputs clean SOLID MODEL files, including STEP, IPT and SLDPRT files. This is not a graphic design project where an image file is an acceptable deliverable.

Deliverables
• Solid model of coin described
• Native part file from your platform
• STEP file (AP214 or newer)
• Confirmation screenshot of overall dimensions and relief heights

I will run a quick simulation in MasterCAM and EdgeCAM to verify

title: PhD SPSS & SmartPLS Analysis
desc:
I have a quantitative dataset that needs to be explored in both SPSS and SmartPLS 4. The project involves running a full suite of descriptive statistics in SPSS (frequencies, measures of central tendency, dispersion, normality checks, basic graphs) and then modelling the same variables in SmartPLS 4 to obtain path coefficients, loadings, AVE, CR, HTMT, R², model fit indices, and bootstrapped significance levels.

What I need from you  
- Complete, fully labelled SPSS output (*.sav + *.spv).  
- The SmartPLS 4 project file and exported reports (HTML/PDF).  
- Tables with figures and citation - APA7 
- A concise Methodology write-up (roughly 1,000–1,500 words) that details interpretation of key findings—written in clear academic language suitable for inclusion in a PhD dissertation.  
- Zero AI-generated or plagiarised text; every line must be your own scholarly work and will be checked with Turnitin.  

Timing  
Everything should be delivered within one month. Interim milestones are welcome so I can review preliminary outputs and request clarifications early.

Acceptance criteria  
1. All analyses replicate without errors when I reopen the provided files.  
2. The narrative follows APA 7th guidelines for tables, figures and citations (if any).  
3. Results reported in the write-up match the numerical values in the output files.  

If you’re comfortable working in both SPSS and SmartPLS 4 and can articulate methods at doctoral level, I look forward to collaborating.

title: Professional Photo Retouching
desc:
I need a skilled editor to take a set of photographs and give them a polished, magazine-ready finish. The core of the job is pure photo editing—no video work or new graphic assets required this time.  

My priority is retouching and enhancement: smoothing skin, removing minor blemishes, bringing out subtle details, and balancing light so every shot looks naturally vibrant without appearing over-processed. If you have a signature workflow in Adobe Photoshop or Lightroom, feel free to use it; I simply want crisp, consistent results.

Please let me know:  
• How many images you can comfortably handle per day  
• Which color-managed file formats you’ll deliver (JPEG, PNG, layered PSD, etc.)  
• Any before-and-after samples that show your retouching range  

Final deliverables should be high-resolution files ready for both web and print. If you also happen to work with video editing or graphic design, mention it—there may be follow-up projects down the line.

title: Replicate Article Results in R
desc:
I will hand over a complete RStudio project folder that already contains the original datasets, the author’s Stata files, and the latest R script (generated with ChatGPT). The task is straightforward: run the script, resolve any execution glitches, and demonstrate that the article’s published numbers are fully reproduced in R.

Scope of replication  
• Produce the same summary statistics and regression analyses reported in the study.  
• Keep every table, coefficient, standard error, and model fit metric in the exact layout the paper uses—formatting needs to mirror the article closely.

What I expect back  
1. The final, clean R script (or .Rmd) used to generate the results.  
2. The raw console output captured during the run.  
3. Regression tables and summary-statistics tables exported in the article’s style (Word, LaTeX, or HTML—whichever the paper follows).  
4. A complete console log so I can see the full, unedited workflow from data import to model estimation.  
5. A brief note confirming that each reported figure matches the publication.

No extra analyses or alterations are necessary; success is measured purely by fidelity to the original results. R (tidyverse, broom, stargazer/gt), and any other packages of choice are fine as long as the final numbers line up perfectly with the paper.

Please provide your portfolio and case studies.

title: On-Site Address Verification Mexico City
desc:
I need a reliable, detail-oriented Field Data Verification Specialist to visit designated physical stores within a specified geographic zone to verify operational status and collect location data. While on-site, you will locate assigned venues using mobile map navigation, operate a dedicated data collection app, capture storefront and brief in-store video footage, and conduct automated Wi-Fi scans to log network presence.

Deliverables:

• Verified on-site operational status and venue details logged via the collection app.
• Clear storefront footage and brief in-store videos that confirm indoor presence at the designated coordinates.
• Completed Wi-Fi scan logs generated through the provided app.

This role requires your own compliant Android device with at least 8GB RAM running Android 7.0 or higher (iOS devices and select Android 9.0 devices are not supported) and a stable mobile data connection. Submitting media that adheres strictly to data quality guidelines and application specifications will complete the task.

title: RAW Image Depth Quantification -- 2
desc:
Project Title: Thermography Depth Quantification for Infrared Images

Project Description:
I am seeking a skilled freelancer to work on thermography depth quantification using infrared images. The project requires the development of a highly novel physics-based modeling approach (not black-box methods) that ensures robust performance across different datasets. The solution must achieve a maximum error of no more than 1%. The deliverables should include detailed documentation and validation of the model's performance.

Timeline: 1 week

Only Physics, Data Analysis, or "Image Processing.

title: Proposal Aplikasi Kolaborasi Profesional
desc:
Saya membutuhkan bantuan untuk menyusun dokumen lengkap rencana pengembangan sebuah aplikasi kolaborasi tim yang ditujukan khusus bagi kalangan profesional. Dokumen tersebut harus memuat dua aspek utama: 

1) Proposal konseptual yang terstruktur;  
2) Gambaran teknis awal agar mudah diterjemahkan ke fase desain dan coding.

Ruang lingkup dokumen yang saya butuhkan mencakup dua belas bagian berikut:
• Judul Project  
• Latar Belakang  
• Identifikasi Masalah  
• Tujuan Project  
• Target Pengguna (fokus pada profesional)  
• Fitur Utama Aplikasi (prioritas Kolaborasi Tim)  
• Alur Sistem—diagram end-to-end yang menjelaskan interaksi pengguna, modul, dan data  
• Teknologi yang Digunakan—saran stack front-end, back-end, dan layanan pendukung yang realistis  
• Keunggulan Aplikasi dibanding solusi serupa  
• Manfaat jangka pendek dan panjang bagi pengguna serta pemangku kepentingan  
• Rencana Pengembangan di Masa Depan (fitur lanjutan, penskalaan, monetisasi)  
• Kesimpulan dengan call-to-action internal untuk tahap berikutnya

Harapan saya:
• Narasi jelas, terstruktur, dan bebas jargon berlebihan.  
• Setiap bagian dilengkapi data pendukung ringkas—statistik pasar, contoh use-case, atau insight pengguna bila tersedia.  
• Alur sistem disertai flowchart sederhana atau diagram UML (JPEG/PNG).  
• Saran teknologi mempertimbangkan performa, keamanan, dan kemudahan pemeliharaan.  
• Dokumen akhir dalam format Google Docs atau Word, siap untuk saya tinjau dan beri komentar.

Jika An

title: Part-Time Teaching Job Hunt
desc:
I’m actively searching for a part-time position in the education sector, specifically a teaching role. I’d like targeted support that helps me move quickly from search to interview.

Here’s what I need from you:
• Identify current part-time teaching vacancies that match my background and location preferences.  
• Tailor my résumé and a concise cover letter for each posting so it passes automated screening systems.  
• Submit the applications on my behalf (or prepare everything for easy one-click submission) and track their status in a shared sheet.  
• Brief me with interview tips once I receive callbacks.

You’re free to use any proven job-search tools, ATS-friendly résumé templates, or keyword-optimization software as long as the final documents remain editable in Word or Google Docs. Clear, timely communication is essential; I’d like updates every two to three days so we can adjust the search strategy together.

My expectation is to start seeing interview invitations within the first few weeks, and I’ll happily provide quick feedback on each deliverable so we stay aligned. If you’ve placed other educators in part-time posts before, let me know when you reply.

title: BIM Development for Novogate Hotel
desc:
Hello,

We are requesting a quotation for the BIM development of the Novogate Hotel Project in Mogadishu.

The rough structural construction has already been completed, and we have a comprehensive package of architectural, structural, mechanical, electrical and BOQ documents.

We require:

* Revit Architecture, Structure and MEP models
* General LOD 300 modeling
* Navisworks federated model and clash detection
* Revit-based quantity schedules and Excel exports
* Comparison between existing BOQs and BIM-generated quantities
* Editable RVT, IFC, NWC, NWF and NWD deliverables
* Clean 3D presentation views

Our focus is the building, coordination and quantities. Loose furniture and detailed interior decoration are not included.

Please send:

* Similar hotel or commercial BIM project samples
* A sample Revit quantity schedule
* A sample Navisworks clash report
* Your proposed team structure
* Fixed-price breakdown by discipline
* Delivery schedule
* Revit version
* Assumptions and exclusions
* Price for a paid pilot area

The complete project package will be shared privately with shortlisted candidates after confidentiality confirmation.

Please confirm whether you can handle Architecture, Structure, MEP, Navisworks coordination and model-based quantity take-off as one coordinated team.

Lütfen başvurunuza daha önce tamamladığınız benzer teknik çeviri çalışmalarından örnekler ekleyin; bu örnekler kaliteyi ve uzmanlığınızı değerlendirmeme yardımcı olacak. 

Teslimat formatı, orijinal dosyayla aynı düzeni korumalı ve istenirse düzenlenebilir (Word, PDF vb.) olmalıdır. Zaman çizelgesi ve sorularınız için mesaj atmanız yeterli; net bir plan üzerinde hızla anlaşalım.

title: Expert Needed: 100K Installs
desc:
My Android app is already live on the Play Store, and I want to scale fast: 100 000 real installs driven exclusively through your own Google Ads account. The core audience is teens (13-19), and beyond the raw install count I expect to see solid post-install engagement, not empty numbers.

Here’s what I need from you:

• Campaign ownership – create, fund, and optimise all Google Ads activity from your account.  
• Teen-focused targeting – placements, keywords, audiences, creatives, and ad copy that genuinely attract 13-19-year-olds.  
• Strict traffic quality – no incentivised, bot, VPN, or otherwise non-compliant methods; all must meet Google Ads and Play Console policy.  
• Transparent reporting – share dashboards or exports (Google Ads, Play Console, Firebase/App Analytics) that clearly show spend, CPI, daily installs, retention, and key engagement metrics.  
• Proof of expertise – screenshots, links, or case studies from previous high-volume app campaigns that demonstrate you have already delivered at least tens of thousands of installs at competitive CPI.  

Acceptance criteria  
• 100 000 additional installs visible in my Play Console.  
• Engagement metrics (session length, retention) in line with or better than typical teen-app benchmarks.  
• Full report pack delivered at completion.

When you reply, please outline your proposed timeline, estimated CPI, and the kind of creative approach you’ll take. I’m ready to move as soon as I can verify your previous results.

title: Google Ads App Installs Boost
desc:
My Android app is already live on the Play Store and now I need an experienced Google Ads specialist who can use your own fully verified ad account to drive fresh installs. The sole KPI is to maximize app installs; engagement and brand visibility are welcome side benefits, but installs are what I will measure success by.

The target profile is a broad, general-audience user base, though I will supply a shortlist of specific countries to focus on so the campaign stays relevant and cost-effective. I expect you to handle the entire workflow: campaign setup (preferably Universal App Campaigns), creative suggestions, keyword optimisation, ongoing bid and budget adjustments, and detailed reporting pulled straight from Google Ads and the Play Console.

Please be comfortable sharing transparent performance metrics—impressions, clicks, installs, CPI—and ready to iterate fast if results stall. Let me know the daily spend you recommend, how quickly you can launch after receiving the country list and Play Store link, and any previous success stories that prove you can hit ambitious install targets. I’m ready to start as soon as you are.

title: Oregon Court Docket Guidance
desc:
I’m the pro-se plaintiff in an Oregon civil tort action and need a knowledgeable guide who can log into the online docket, open it correctly, and translate its contents into plain English for me. My immediate priority is understanding the status of the most recent filings and any motions currently on the table, but I’d also like clarity on what each entry actually means and where the case stands procedurally.

You should already be comfortable navigating Oregon’s electronic court records (OJD, OECI, PACER if federal filings appear) and be able to spot key dates, deadlines, and next steps without giving me formal legal advice. A background in Oregon civil procedure is ideal because I want to know not just what has been filed but what is likely to happen next and what my timeframes look like.

Deliverables I’m expecting:
• A PDF or screenshot bundle of the current docket entries.  
• A plain-language summary highlighting each recent filing, its purpose, and its current status.  
• A short roadmap outlining the immediate procedural steps I should anticipate based on what’s already in the record.

We can communicate by phone or Zoom if needed, but I’m happy to receive everything in writing first. I’m ready to start as soon as you can access the docket.

title: Amazon Canada Product Hunting Expert Needed for 3 Private Label Winning Products
desc:

no trending

The products must be selected only from Pet Supplies Home and Kitchen Sports and Outdoors or Office Products

Do not recommend glass products fragile products liquids chemicals health products medical products food supplements battery products rechargeable products electronics electrical products seasonal products baby safety products hazardous products or products requiring certifications licences approvals or complicated compliance

The products should preferably be small lightweight evergreen easy to manufacture easy to inspect and suitable for Amazon FBA

Each recommended product should have realistic monthly revenue potential of approximately CAD 12000 to CAD 15000 or more in the Canadian marketplace

The freelancer must verify that multiple sellers are generating consistent sales and that the niche is not completely controlled by Amazon or one major brand

The competition should be manageable and there must be a realistic opportunity to enter the market with a better private label product

The freelancer must use Helium 10 Jungle Scout and DataDive

All data must be specifically researched for Amazon Canada and not copied from

title: National RTE Chicken Strategy
desc:
I am preparing to roll out a Ready-To-Eat boiled chicken line and need a clear, data-driven market strategy that will succeed across the national market. Because RTE boiled chicken is my sole focus within the Horeca space, every insight must speak directly to product positioning, pricing, and channel selection for this single category.

Here is what I expect to receive:

• Market landscape review – size, growth, key trends, and seasonality for RTE boiled chicken nationally.  
• Competitor benchmark – SKUs, price points, packaging styles, and promotion tactics now winning shelf space.  
• Target-segment breakdown – B2B (restaurants, caterers, convenience chains) and B2C retail opportunities, with buyer personas and purchase drivers.  
• Go-to-market plan – recommended entry sequence, channel mix, distributor or wholesaler partnerships, and any food safety or labelling regulations that could affect rollout.  
• Marketing & promo roadmap – messaging, campaign themes, digital touchpoints, and in-store activations mapped to a 12-month calendar.  
• KPI set and measurement approach so I can track traction, iterate quickly, and hit volume targets.

Please back recommendations with credible data sources (Nielsen, Euromonitor, local trade reports, etc.) and present the final strategy in a concise slide deck plus an actionable spreadsheet detailing timelines, budgets, and responsibilities.

Once delivered, I should be able to hand the plan straight to my sales and operations teams and

title: Authoritative Explainer Voice Over
desc:
I have several short explainer videos aimed at business professionals and I need a seasoned voice-over artist to bring them to life. The messaging relies on a confident, authoritative delivery that feels human and reassuring—please, no AI or synthetic reads.

Here is what I expect:

• A polished, studio-quality recording for each video, supplied as separate WAV or high-bitrate MP3 files  
• Clean, breath-controlled takes ready to drop straight onto the timeline (little to no post-cleanup required on my end)  
• Consistent pacing and tone across all pieces so the series sounds cohesive

Once I provide the final scripts and video timings, a quick sample read of 15–20 seconds will help confirm the direction. After approval, I’ll need the full tracks within the agreed turnaround window.

If you have questions about pronunciation, timing, or technical specs, let me know early so everything flows smoothly. I look forward to hearing your voice elevate these explainers.

title: แปลบทความทั่วไปเป็นอังกฤษ
desc:
ฉันมีงานเขียนทั่วไปประเภท “บทความ” ต้องการแปลเป็นภาษาอังกฤษให้ลื่นไหล อ่านเข้าใจง่าย และคงเจตนาต้นฉบับครบถ้วน  

ขอบเขตงาน  
• รับต้นฉบับภาษาไทย (ไฟล์ .docx หรือ Google Docs)  
• แปลเป็นภาษาอังกฤษสำนวนธรรมชาติ ไม่ใช้เครื่องแปลดิบ  
• เก็บรักษาคำเฉพาะชื่อองค์กร ชื่อสินค้า หรือศัพท์เทคนิคตามต้นฉบับ  
• จัดรูปแบบย่อหน้า หัวข้อ และบรรณานุกรม (ถ้ามี) ให้เรียบร้อย  

สิ่งที่คาดหวัง  
1. ไฟล์แปลฉบับสมบูรณ์ (.docx หรือ Google Docs พร้อมสิทธิแก้ไข)  
2. เช็กสะกด ไวยากรณ์ และความสอดคล้องของสำนวนเรียบร้อย  
3. ส่งงานตรงเวลา พร้อมเปิดรับคำขอปรับแก้เล็กน้อยภายในขอบเขตเดียวกัน  

หากคุณถนัดเอกสารแนวอื่นอย่าง “บทความทางวิชาการ” หรือ “เอกสารธุรกิจ” ก็คุยกันได้ในโปรเจกต์ต่อไป แต่ตอนนี้โฟกัสที่บทความทั่วไปก่อนนะคะ  

แจ้งระยะเวลาที่คุณต้องใช้ต่อบทความหนึ่งชิ้นและแนบตัวอย่างผลงานแปลภาษาอังกฤษที่ใกล้เคียงที่สุดมาพร้อมใบเสนอราคาได้เลยค่ะ

title: Annotated Tank Structure Outline Drawing
desc:
I have an example sketch of a storage-tank structure and now need it converted into a clean, professional engineering drawing outline. The finished piece must show the full tank profile, key structural elements and all critical dimensions, supplemented by concise call-outs or annotations wherever clarification is useful.  

Level of detail: this is not just a simple trace—I expect a detailed outline with accurate measurements and text notes positioned logically around the view. Once complete, save and hand over the drawing as a high-resolution PDF suitable for direct insertion into our engineering documentation set.  

Deliverables  
• One annotated, measurement-ready outline of the tank in PDF  
• Source file from your preferred CAD platform (DWG is preference) so we can make future edits if needed  

Acceptance criteria  
• Dimensions and annotation styles follow standard engineering conventions  
• Line weights and layering remain clear when printed on A3  
• Overall layout matches the reference sketch while correcting any visible proportional errors  
• To be added into a template which I will provide

If you work in AutoCAD, SolidWorks DraftSight or similar, you’ll be right at home. I’ll send the reference file as soon as we start—looking forward to seeing your draft.

title: Personal Art Website Setup
desc:
Saya membutuhkan bantuan untuk membuat website pribadi yang berfungsi penuh untuk menjual ilustrasi digital saya. Fokus utama saya adalah:

• Website pribadi yang tampil bersih dan responsif dengan galeri karya, detail harga, serta tombol “beli sekarang”.  
• Fitur checkout aman dengan pilihan pembayaran populer di Indonesia.  
• Integrasi Instagram—feed otomatis muncul di situs dan tombol yang memudahkan pengunjung berpindah ke profil saya untuk mengikuti atau berinteraksi lebih lanjut.  
• Struktur SEO dasar dan meta tag agar ilustrasi saya mudah ditemukan.  
• Panduan singkat (video atau PDF) tentang cara menambah karya baru, mengatur stok digital, dan memproses pesanan.

Saya sudah memiliki konten ilustrasi dan akun Instagram; saya hanya memerlukan keahlian Anda dalam desain, pengembangan, dan integrasi. Jika Anda berpengalaman membuat toko online artis atau portofolio kreatif, jelaskan pendekatan, durasi kerja, dan contoh situs serupa yang pernah Anda bangun.

title: Mid-Rise Modern Mall Design
desc:
I need a complete architectural scheme for a modern, mid-rise shopping complex—think three to five levels with a clean glass-and-steel aesthetic. The layout must guide visitors naturally from the entrances to a central food court and prominent showroom space while keeping circulation, service corridors, underground parking, and MEP shafts efficient and code-compliant.  

Your work should cover everything from early massing studies through detailed floor plans, façade elevations, and lighting concepts, capped with persuasive 3-D visualisations so stakeholders can approve materials and spatial flow before we break ground.  

Key amenities to integrate  
• A high-capacity food court positioned for maximum footfall  
• Flexible, street-visible showroom space suitable for an anchor tenant  

Acceptance criteria  
• Full PDF drawing set plus editable CAD files  
• At least three photo-realistic renders of the exterior and main atrium  
• Compliance with all local building codes and standard scale conventions  

If you have prior experience with multi-level malls or comparable commercial projects, please share examples so we can move quickly into scheduling and milestones.

title: Technical Inspection for Three-Phase Induction Motor in Brazil
desc:
I need an experienced inspector to perform a technical inspection of a three-phase induction motor at WEG Equipamentos Elétricos S.A – Energy Division in Jaraguá do Sul, Santa Catarina, Brazil. The scope includes:

- Document Review (MTCs, calibration certificates, approved drawings, procedures, and supplier certificates)
- Visual and Dimensional Inspection
- Rotor Balancing Inspection
- Routine Electrical Tests (winding resistance, no-load test, rotation direction, withstand voltage, and insulation resistance)
- Performance/Type Tests (impedance, breakdown torque, efficiency, power factor, and temperature-rise test)
- Polarization Index Test
- Accessories and Instrumentation Check (PT-100, vibration sensors, and current transformers)
- Final Painting Inspection (paint thickness and adhesion)

The inspection will be based on the approved ITP. Deliverables include signed witness sheets from the manufacturer’s tests and an independent inspection report with photos and raw data. The requested inspection dates are from August 3 to August 7, 2026.

Budget: $250–$350 USD per man-day. Inspection and reporting skills along with good photo shooting are very important.

title: Printed Document Data Entry
desc:
I have a collection of printed documents that need to be converted into editable, well-formatted Word files. Every page is pure text—no tables or complex layouts—so the task is a straightforward transcription job. Accuracy is crucial: spelling, punctuation, and line breaks should match the originals unless a clear typo is obvious, in which case you may quietly correct it.

The workflow is simple. I will supply high-resolution scans (PDF or JPG), and you will retype the content directly into Word, applying consistent headings and paragraph styles so the final file is clean, searchable, and ready for further editing. Before sending the finished document back, give it a quick proof-read to be sure nothing was missed.

Deliverable:

Marketing support is equally important. You’ll manage our social channels, keeping a consistent posting rhythm and responding to basic community questions. When it comes to content creation, the focus is video: editing short clips, adding simple motion graphics, and formatting them for platforms such as Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts and LinkedIn.

Core tools in daily use include Google Workspace, Chatgpt, Excel or Sheets for data entry, Meta Business Suite, Mailchimp (or a comparable email platform) and any short video editor like Filmora or Capcut. If you’re already comfortable with those, you’ll ramp up quickly.

Prefer MALAYSIA BASED for cultural and language compability. 

Deliverables each week
• Zero-backlog inbox and an updated action list
• Fully confirmed calendar for the following week
• Social posts scheduled and queued for all channels
• One polished, platform-ready video (30–90 seconds

title: Complete Home Title Search

Deliver the results as a concise PDF summary along with scans or direct links to supporting documents. Clarity, accuracy, and quick turnaround will win this job.
