title: Secure Gap & Hard Money
desc:
I am under contract on a residential deal valued between $500K and $1M and need to line up funding right away. Specifically, I am looking for:

• A gap lender willing to cover the down-payment portion.  
• A hard money lender that can fund the acquisition for six months, giving me time to sell the property.

I do not yet have relationships with either type of lender, so you will be starting from a blank slate. Your role is to introduce me to reputable lenders, facilitate initial conversations, and help me compare term sheets until we have commitments that align with my timeline and exit strategy.

Deliverables  
1. Short-list of at least three qualified gap lenders and three hard money lenders, including contact information and lending criteria.  
2. Written summary of proposed terms for each option (LTV, interest rate, points, fees, and any prepayment penalties).  
3. Confirmation of lenders’ ability to close within my required window.  
4. A recommendation memo highlighting the best pairing and next steps.

Speed is critical; please indicate how quickly you can deliver the short-list and set up the first calls.

title: C libpq Postgres Dynamic Resource Configuration
desc:
I’m building a low-level control layer in C, talking to PostgreSQL exclusively through libpq. The goal is to let me steer the database in real time—core by core, megabyte by megabyte, and user by user—without relying on pgAdmin, psql scripts, or any third-party orchestration tool.

Functional scope  
• Core-wise processing: I want to pin heavy jobs to specific CPU cores from the client side, exposing an API call where I pass a core map and the session adjusts `SET max_parallel_workers_per_gather`, `cpu_tuple_cost`, or similar parameters on the fly.  
• RAM-wise resource allocation: Memory ceilings should be adjustable per connection so I can bump or throttle `work_mem`, `shared_buffers`, or temp file limits dynamically.  
• User-wise messaging queues: Each authenticated user gets an isolated message queue (implemented with NOTIFY/LISTEN or a lightweight queue table) so that background services can publish progress, and consumers can subscribe without polling. Message ordering and at-least-once delivery matter.  

The workload is transaction-heavy, so every change—parameter tweak, schema hot-patch, or permission flip—has to remain ACID-safe. Your code must wrap each modification in explicit BEGIN/COMMIT blocks and roll back cleanly on failure.

Dynamic configuration required  
• Parameter tuning — expose setter/getter wrappers for the GUCs mentioned above.  
• Database schema changes — e.g., creating the per-user queue tables on demand.  
• User permissions — grant, revoke, or

title: Indian Company Secretary Assignment
desc:
My company needs a qualified company secretary based in India to handle a concentrated, one-time assignment that ties up all loose ends before our next strategic phase. The engagement covers three clear areas—regulatory compliance, board meeting management, and statutory documentation & filings—under the Companies Act 2013 and related MCA requirements.

Scope of work  
• Regulatory compliance: Review our current standing, flag gaps, and file any overdue e-forms with the ROC so that the MCA portal shows “compliant” status by project close.  
• Board meeting management: Draft notice, agenda, and resolutions for a single board meeting, guide us through proper conduct (virtual is fine), and prepare the signed minutes.  
• Documentation & filing: Update statutory registers, compile supporting papers, and e-file all forms generated during this exercise; share stamped acknowledgments.

Acceptance criteria  
1. All MCA/ROC filings are accepted without resubmission.  
2. Board minutes are signed and timestamped according to secretarial standards.  
3. Final handover pack (PDF + editable formats) contains updated registers, signed minutes, and filing receipts.

Most of the work can be done remotely, although occasional phone or video check-ins may help speed decisions. Please outline your ICSI credentials, recent experiences closing similar engagements, and an estimated turnaround time.

title: Penyusunan Rencana Usaha Jasa
desc:
Saya sedang memulai sebuah usaha berbasis jasa dan membutuhkan bantuan untuk menyusun rencana bisnis yang solid. Fokus saya adalah memastikan model layanan yang ditawarkan jelas, mudah dijalankan, dan mampu menarik pasar sejak hari pertama.

Yang saya perlukan:

• Perumusan model bisnis (Business Model Canvas) lengkap dengan alur pendapatan

Dokumen akhir cukup dalam format PDF disertai spreadsheet terpisah untuk angka-angka keuangan. Jika Anda berpengalaman membangun atau mengembangkan bisnis jasa, terutama di pasar lokal, saya menantikan kolaborasi ini.

title: Remote Full-Time Data Entry Clerk Needed
desc:
We are expanding my operations team and need a full-time data entry clerk who can work remotely with very little hand-holding. Day to day you’ll be inside our customer account database keying in, verifying, and updating financial data that feeds directly into our reporting dashboards. Accuracy is critical; a single typo can throw off the month-end numbers, so I need someone who naturally double-checks their own work and spots inconsistencies quickly.

Microsoft Excel will be your primary tool—everything from basic formatting to VLOOKUPs and pivot tables for cross-checks. If you already have at least two years of dedicated data entry experience and feel comfortable juggling multiple spreadsheets while meeting daily deadlines, you’ll fit right in.

Beyond routine entry, I’ll occasionally loop you into larger projects that require bulk uploads or data clean-ups. When that happens, I’ll outline the scope, sample records, and my acceptance criteria (error rate under 0.2 % after final review). You may also pitch in with light admin tasks such as preparing summary sheets for the Director of Operations.

Strong organizational habits, analytical thinking, and reliable time management will set you apart. If you’re ready to own this data pipeline from wherever you are, let’s talk.

title: Growth-Stage VC Pitch Deck
desc:
I need a sharp, data-driven investor pitch deck that speaks directly to venture capitalists and conveys the momentum we have already built at our current growth / revenue stage. Your work should shape our story into a concise slide deck that quickly answers the two questions VCs care about most: how big this can get, and why we are the team to make it happen.

Key expectations  
• Translate our existing traction, metrics and unit economics into clear, compelling visuals.  
• Craft a narrative arc that moves from problem and solution to market size, business model, competitive edge and expansion plan.  
• Supply polished slides (PowerPoint or Google Slides) plus speaker notes so I can present confidently.  
• Iterate once we review the first draft to tighten any weak spots.

A background in fundraising materials or direct experience working with venture investors will help you hit the right tone. If this sounds like your wheelhouse, tell me how you would tackle it and share a sample deck or two that won funding.

title: Biogas Model Audit
desc:
I have a completed financial model for a biogas plant and now need a sharp, independent audit that zeroes in on overall investment feasibility. Please walk through every sheet, test every formula, and challenge each assumption to confirm whether the numbers truly stack up under three parallel scenarios:  
• FiT (Feed-in Tariff) sales  
• Upgraded scrubbed gas sales  
• CNG production and distribution  

The model is built in Excel, so you will need deep fluency with advanced Excel functions, scenario management and sensitivity tools. A quick turnaround is essential; I am ready to share the file immediately and would like initial feedback as soon as you can open it.

Deliverables  
1. The original workbook returned with in-cell comments or a clearly marked review sheet showing corrections, red-flags and stress-test results.  
2. A concise memo (PDF or Word) that:  
   • Confirms or challenges the viability of the project in each scenario,  
   • Highlights key drivers that swing the IRR/NPV,  
   • Flags any material data gaps or unrealistic inputs, and  
   • Recommends next-step actions to make the case bankable.  

Acceptance criteria: all formulas trace without error, material issues are clearly explained, and the memo provides a go/no-go recommendation per scenario.

If you have immediate availability and a track record auditing renewable-energy models, let’s move forward today.

title: Automotive ECU Firmware Reverse-Engineering -- 2
desc:
I have an original automotive ECU image that targets an NXP / Freescale SPC5777C (PowerPC e200 VLE, big-endian) and two derivative builds, V1 and V2. My goal is to understand—exactly what each patch changes and how it affects firmware behaviour—what each patch actually changes.  

You will work with all three binaries, identify the modified routines in V1 and V2, and map them back to the stock code so I can see exactly how behaviour has been altered. I am interested first and foremost in the functional differences; security or performance angles are out of scope unless they surface naturally during analysis.  

Deliverables  
• A clear, step-by-step analysis for every modified routine in V1 and V2, showing original flow versus patched flow, register usage, branching logic, lookup-table adjustments, and any calibration data touched.  
• Annotated disassembly (Ghidra, IDA, or Binary Ninja output is fine) linked to your narrative so I can trace the reasoning myself.  
• Source-level pseudocode or commented assembly where that aids clarity.  

Acceptance criteria  
The write-up lets me reproduce each finding in my own tooling, and it explains why the firmware now behaves differently (or identically) in real-world operation. If your document walks me through flashing the ECU, running a trace, and seeing the new behaviour manifest exactly as described, the job is complete.  

If you have prior experience with SPC5xx, e200 VLE, or other automotive PowerPC targets, please mention the

title: RPA Data-to-Excel Automation - GIVE US THE FINAL PRICE
desc:
I need a small but reliable robot that logs in to our QuickCEP CRM every five minutes, extracts both Inbound call data and Activity logs, re-formats and merges the results, then writes the refreshed figures into a single Excel workbook that the team already uses for reporting.

Acceptance criteria  
1. Bot runs on a standard Windows 11 PC with no manual clicks after start-up.  
2. Every execution pulls the latest Sales data and Activity logs from QuickCEP and updates Excel correctly.  
3. Runtime per cycle stays under two minutes, leaving buffer before the next five-minute trigger.

title: फोन से पैसे कमाना फोन पर  - 22/07/2026 00:55 EDT
desc:
मैं एक दिल छू लेने वाली हिंदी कहानी-पुस्तक लिखवाना चाहता हूँ। कहानी का नायक दीपु नाम का बच्चा है जिसे पढ़ाई से अगाध प्रेम है; पूरी रचना का उद्देश्य बच्चों को सीखने के प्रति उत्साह और दृढ़ता के मूल्य सिखाना है।  

कहानी शैली (story) तय है, और यह किताब (book) के रूप में चाहिए—​लगभग 8-10 छोटे अध्याय, सरल-सुगम भाषा, खुशनुमा संवाद और मोड़-बिंदुओं के साथ। चित्रण की जरूरत फिलहाल नहीं है, पर यदि आपके पास इलस्ट्रेशन का अनुभव हो तो बताइए, मैं खुले दिमाग से विचार कर सकता हूँ।  

मैं चाहूँगा कि आप पहले एक संक्षिप्त अध्याय-ढाँचा भेजें; स्वीकृति के बाद पूरा पांडुलिपि ड्राफ्ट तैयार करें। Word या Google Docs में फ़ाइल दें ताकि टिप्पणी करना आसान रहे। एक रिविज़न शामिल मानें—​स्कूल-पाठकों और माता-पिता की शुरुआती प्रतिक्रिया के आधार पर छोटा-मोटा सुधार हो सकता है।  

डेडलाइन पर सख्‍ती से अमल, प्लैगरिज़्म-फ्री लेखन और प्रवाहमय, बच्चा-दोस्ताना कथानक मेरी प्राथमिकताएँ हैं। आपका अनुभव यदि बाल-साहित्य, शैक्षिक सामग्री या प्रेरक कथाओं में है तो ज़रूर बताइए; नमूना पृष्ठ भेज सकें तो तुरंत लाभ होगा।

title: Residential NFPA 13D Fire Sprinkler Plan Revision and Hydraulic Calculations
desc:
Project Location: San Diego County, California

I am seeking an experienced residential fire sprinkler designer to revise an existing NFPA 13D fire sprinkler plan for a new single-family residence with a Junior Accessory Dwelling Unit, or JADU, in San Diego County, California.

The existing fire sprinkler drawings were designed using a 1¼-inch fire meter and underground water service. However, Valley Center Municipal Water District installed the following:

1-inch fire meter
1-inch service lateral from the water main
1-inch auxiliary double-check assembly

San Diego County Fire has directed me to submit revised fire sprinkler plans, hydraulic calculations, and product specification sheets directly to County Fire for review and approval.

Existing Documents

The current fire sprinkler package includes four sheets, F1 through F4.

A limited pressure calculation appears on Sheet F2, but a complete, separate, node-by-node hydraulic calculation report was not provided.

The selected designer must review the existing system layout and prepare a complete and defensible hydraulic calculation based on the actual installed 1-inch water service.

The following documents can be provided:

Existing F1 through F4 fire sprinkler drawings in PDF format
Full approved architectural plan set
Current architectural CAD files, if needed and available
Water district confirmation of the installed fire service components
Preliminary Project Information
NFPA 13D residential sprinkler system
New single

title: Mobile App Security Training Expert
desc:
Job Title

Mobile Application Security & Penetration Testing Trainer (Android & iOS)

Experience

6–10+ Years

Location

Virtual (Training Assignment)

Role Summary

We are looking for an experienced Mobile Application Security Trainer to deliver advanced technical training on iOS and Android Application Security Analysis and Penetration Testing. The trainer should possess strong hands-on expertise in mobile application security, vulnerability assessment, reverse engineering, and penetration testing, with the ability to conduct practical, lab-based training sessions.

Android & iOS Application Security Testing

title: Mechanical Random Vibration Failure Analysis
desc:
I need a thorough random‐vibration study on a mechanical system with the sole aim of pinpointing where it is most likely to fail. You will start by translating my load spectra into an appropriate PSD, run the analysis, and then interpret the stress and displacement responses to highlight critical hot spots. I expect clear plots, supporting calculations, and a concise engineering report that spells out the predicted failure points and practical design improvements.

Finite-element software such as ANSYS, Abaqus, or Nastran is fine as long as the solver can handle random vibration and produce fatigue-relevant outputs. Please document the material properties, boundary conditions, and damping assumptions you use so I can reproduce the results later if needed.

Deliverables  
• Native model files and post-processing scripts  
• PDF report with methodology, PSD input, results, and recommendations  
• Short call or written summary walking me through the findings

Accuracy and traceability matter more than glossy formatting, so keep every step reproducible and unit-consistent. Let me know which toolset you prefer and an estimated turnaround once you see the model size.

title: G+2 Architectural Design Package
desc:
I have a 23 ft × 42 ft plot that will hold a ground-plus-two residence. I need a complete set of drawings and visuals so construction can start without iteration onsite.

First, I want a clear floor plan for all three levels that comfortably fits bedrooms, bathrooms and a living room on each floor in the most efficient layout you can devise. Once the room arrangement is agreed, I’ll need full structural drawings—including column, beam and slab details—ready for the engineer’s stamp.

Plumbing should follow a standard residential layout, keeping pipe runs short and service shafts aligned floor-to-floor. Electrical drawings must show lighting, power and low-current points with circuit segregation.

Finally, I would like a modern 3D elevation that reflects clean lines and contemporary materials, rendered from at least two angles so I can visualise massing and façade treatment before signing off.

Acceptance criteria  
• PDF + editable (DWG/REVIT) files for floor plans, structure, plumbing and electrical  
• High-resolution rendered images (JPG/PNG) of the modern façade, plus the source model  
• All dimensions and levels annotated in metric and imperial  
• Files delivered in organised folders, named logically for easy reference

title: Design Navaratri Silver Earrings Series
desc:
I am preparing a demi-fine jewellery launch built around Navaratri—the nine nights that celebrate the divine feminine in her many forms. For this capsule I need nine distinct earring concepts, each honouring one night and its presiding goddess. All pieces will ultimately be produced in silver and 2.5 micron gold plated, so the design language should highlight that metal’s lustre and hand-worked character.

The overall mood is unapologetically traditional: think temple art, folk ornament and classical Indian line work rather than modern minimalism. Within that framework, I still want range—some designs can lean on clear goddess iconography, others may translate cultural motifs or even abstract the energy of each deity into texture or silhouette. The key is that when the full set is viewed together, the narrative of the festival feels complete.

Deliverables I need from you  
• A polished sketch or digital render for each of the nine earrings (PDF or high-resolution JPEG/PNG).  
• Front, side and top views plus basic dimensions, ready for CAD or artisan hand-fabrication.  
• A short note per design explaining the chosen goddess reference, motif or abstraction, and how it ties back to that night of Navaratri.

Acceptance criteria  
• All nine designs are clearly distinct yet cohesive as a series.  
• Motifs are culturally accurate and respectful.  
• Every piece is technically feasible in sterling silver at demi-fine price points.  
• Files arrive print-ready and easy for a CAD

title: Atlanta 80th Anniversary Slideshow
desc:
I have 40 cherished photographs that I want transformed into a heartfelt, traditional-style slideshow that will be shown at an 80th-anniversary celebration here in Atlanta. The goal is to walk guests through the honoree’s life story, photo by photo, with a warm professional voice-over carrying the narrative. 

Here’s what I need from you:
• Careful sequencing and gentle transitions that feel classic rather than flashy.  
• A professionally recorded narration. I’ll supply the draft script and we can refine it together before you record it.  
• No background music—just the voice and the images so every word is clear.  
• A draft version for feedback, then a polished HD video file (MP4) ready to play on a standard projector or large TV.

Because these pictures mean a lot to the family, I’d like to sit down in person at least once to review the order and script. Please reply only if you’re working in or very near Atlanta, GA and are available to meet this coming week. I look forward to creating something beautiful together.

title: AIS140 PCB & Firmware Development
desc:
I’m building an AIS-140 compliant tracking unit and need one partner who can take the idea from schematic to fully tested firmware in a single run.  That means you will design the multilayer PCB, select components that satisfy ARAI / AIS-140 certification, and deliver production-ready firmware that handles GPS/GNSS acquisition, GSM/LTE data transfer, SMS fall-back, panic button logic, CAN interface, and standard-mandated encryption and packet formats.

Scope  
• Complete schematic capture and PCB layout (Altium, KiCad, or similar) including Gerbers, BOM, 3-D step files, and assembly drawings.  
• Firmware in C/C++ (preferred on STM32 or an equivalent automotive-grade MCU) covering GNSS parsing, GPRS/LTE socket handling, FOTA, accelerometer-based tamper detection, and diagnostic logging.  
• Prototype bring-up, bench testing, and assistance through initial certification.

Acceptance criteria  
1. Hardware files open, compile, and pass DRC/ERC without critical errors.  
2. Firmware compiles with documented toolchain and transmits AIS-140 payloads to a test server for 72 h continuously without dropouts.  
3. Current consumption, GNSS TTFF, and thermal limits fall within AIS-140 tables.

When you message me, focus on your direct experience designing automotive or AIS-140 devices, the tools you use, and one brief example of a similar project you have shipped. I’m ready to start immediately and will share mechanical constraints and enclosure drawings once we agree on the approach.

title: Daily Parental Nutrition Tracking
desc:
I’ve decided it’s time to give my partner and myself professional, day-to-day guidance on what we eat so we can stay on top of our general health and wellness. We both follow a vegetarian/vegan lifestyle, so every recommendation must respect that choice while still being varied and enjoyable.

Here is what I need from you: track everything the two of us consume each day, analyse the nutritional profile, and then suggest practical improvements for the following day. Think of it as an ongoing feedback loop rather than a one-off meal plan. I want your input on portion sizes, macro and micro balance, hydration, and simple swaps we can make to close any nutrient gaps, all documented in an easy-to-follow format (Google Sheets or a nutrition app of your choice is fine as long as it exports clean reports).

Deliverables  
• Daily log of food intake with macro/micro breakdown  
• Next-day recommendations aligned with vegetarian/vegan guidelines  
• Weekly wrap-up highlighting trends, wins, and areas to tweak  

Acceptance criteria  
• Logs delivered within 12 hours of receiving our food diary photos  
• Suggestions must clearly state “keep”, “adjust”, or “replace” actions for each meal  
• Nutrient analysis references accepted standards (USDA, WHO, or similar)  

If you have experience with tools like Cronometer, MyFitnessPal, NutriBase, or similar, mention it; seamless data capture is a big plus. Consistency and clear communication matter more to us than fancy presentation, so if you

title: Health Band Multi-Layer KiCad PCB
desc:
I need a seasoned KiCad specialist to turn my wearable health-band concept into a production-ready, multi-layer PCB. The board’s sole purpose is data communication, and it must do so over Bluetooth using a Nordic Semiconductor microcontroller (nRF52 family or a comparable part you can justify).  

You will start from my block diagram and recommended component set, refine the schematic, route the multi-layer stack with controlled impedance for the RF section, and deliver gerbers, pick-and-place, and a clean BOM. KiCad 7 is preferred so I can review your work without back-porting issues.  

Deliverables  
• Complete KiCad project folder (schematic, PCB layout, libraries)  
• Gerber & drill files, assembly outputs, and BOM ready for a board house  
• Brief design report confirming DRC clearance, Bluetooth antenna tuning, and Nordic reference-layout adherence  

Acceptance criteria  
The design must pass KiCad DRC with no errors, meet Nordic’s layout guidelines, and be manufacturable by JLCPCB or an equivalent service without additional edits.  

If you can also suggest optional Wi-Fi or NFC expansion zones, note them, but keep the initial board focused on Bluetooth. Let’s move quickly—I’m ready to send this board to fab as soon as the files check out.

title: Bookkeeping, Tax, Analysis
desc:
I’m looking for dependable, ongoing support with the day-to-day accounting for my small business. Everything runs through Xero, so you’ll need to be comfortable working inside that platform each day.

Here’s what I’d like you to handle:

• Bookkeeping ― record and reconcile transactions, post journals, keep the chart of accounts tidy, and chase down any anomalies before close of business.  
• Tax preparation ― keep ledgers tax-ready year-round, flag deductible items, and compile the working papers I’ll hand off to my CPA at filing time.  
• Financial analysis ― generate concise daily snapshots and a rolling monthly dashboard so I can track cash flow, margins, and variances against budget.

I’ll provide secure, limited-access credentials to Xero together with our existing workflow notes. Timeliness is critical: updates must be reflected in Xero by the end of each business day so that reports stay current.

Acceptance criteria  
• All transactions for the day entered and reconciled in Xero by 7 p.m. local time.  
• Any unreconciled items or data gaps clearly flagged in the notes.  
• Weekly summary report (exported from Xero) delivered every Friday, highlighting key metrics and tax considerations.

If you’re experienced with Xero and can commit to a consistent daily cadence, I’d love to hear how you’d keep my books clean and my numbers decision-ready.

title: AI-Driven Toy Brand Series
desc:
I'm seeking a creative freelancer to develop an engaging AI series for Instagram that will entertain and promote my toy brand. The series should include both images and videos.

Key Requirements:
- Entertaining content focused on toys
- AI-generated images and videos
- Engaging storytelling to attract followers

Ideal Skills:
- Experience in AI content creation
- Strong background in social media marketing
- Ability to create captivating visuals and narratives

Please include relevant experience in your application.

title: Affiliate Marketing For E Book
desc:
Digital Marketing Partnership – Promote Our AI E-Book

We are looking for experienced digital marketers who are interested in promoting our AI eBook through their own marketing channels.

This is a performance-based partnership. You will receive a unique tracking link, and compensation is based on verified sales generated through your link.

Ideal applicants have experience with:

- Social media marketing
- Content creation
- Online communities
- Email marketing
- Digital promotion

Applicants should be self-motivated, professional, and capable of driving genuine traffic and sales.

Please apply with a brief description of your marketing experience and the methods you plan to use for promotion.

Note: This opportunity is intended for individuals who are comfortable with performance-based compensation and are committed to delivering genuine results.

title: QA Automation Testing for Marketplace Mobile App (Android & iOS)
desc:
Our Android & iOS marketplace app is live and growing fast; now I need a rock-solid automated test suite to keep releases safe and smooth. The feature set is broad—registration/login, product browsing, cart, order management, push notifications, profiles—but your first mission is crystal-clear: safeguard the entire checkout and payment integrations flow.

You’ll own the full setup: selecting the most effective mobile-friendly framework (Selenium, Appium, TestComplete or another you can justify), configuring device coverage, writing maintainable scripts, and wiring everything into our CI pipeline so tests run on every build. Clear, actionable reporting is essential; I want to see failures pinpointed down to the step.

Deliverables  
• Automated test suite focused on checkout & payment (with room to extend to other flows)  
• Environment/config files and documentation so any team member can run the suite locally or via CI  
• Initial run report plus guidance on interpreting future results  

Scope of Work
1. Automation Framework Setup
Recommend and implement a suitable automation testing framework.
Support both Android and iOS platforms.
Create a scalable and maintainable test automation architecture.
Integrate reporting and test execution dashboards.
2. Test Case Automation

Automate critical user journeys including:

User Authentication
-Sign Up
-Login / Logout
-Forgot Password
-OTP Verification
Product Discovery
-Product Listing
-Search Functionality
-Filters & Sorting
-Prod

title: Stratégie Email Missions Freelance
desc:
Je débute sur cette plateforme et je souhaite rapidement décrocher mes premières missions en audit, évaluation de projets et appui technique des équipes. Pour y parvenir, j’ai choisi de mettre l’accent sur le marketing par courriel.  

Votre mission sera de m’aider à :  
• Construire une liste de contacts qualifiés (décideurs, ONG, cabinets de conseil, agences de développement, etc.) susceptibles d’avoir besoin de mes services depuis Lomé et à l’international.  
• Établir une méthodologie claire pour collecter ces adresses : sources fiables, segmentation, outils de capture et conformité RGPD.  
• Proposer un premier plan d’action pour engager ces prospects par e-mail : cadence d’envoi, positionnement d’expert, ton et valeur ajoutée.  

Livrables attendus :  
1. Fichier de contacts (Excel/CSV) avec champs complets et segmentation.  
2. Guide étape par étape décrivant les sources utilisées et le workflow de collecte.  
3. Calendrier de campagne et recommandations pour les trois premiers e-mails d’approche.  

Je privilégie une approche pragmatique, facilement réplicable et adaptée à mon contexte africain. Merci de préciser dans votre proposition vos expériences similaires et les outils que vous maîtrisez pour la prospection e-mail.

title: Chandigarh Customer Support Telecallers Needed
desc:
I am expanding my customer support team in Chandigarh and need at least seven skilled telecallers who can engage with genuine leads over the phone. Your core task will be customer support calls—answering questions, clarifying next steps, and ensuring every caller feels fully assisted. The leads are already qualified; you simply focus on guiding them and recording outcomes in our CRM.

To thrive in this role you should be comfortable speaking in clear Hindi and basic English, handling a steady call volume, and updating each interaction in real time. If you already have experience working with any standard call-center dialer or CRM (Zoho, Freshdesk, or similar), mention it, as it will speed up onboarding.

Daily responsibilities will include:
• Making customer support calls to the provided lead list  
• Logging call notes, status, and follow-up actions accurately  
• Flagging any unresolved issues for my escalation team  

I will supply the script outline, lead database, and call-tracking credentials. All you need is a quiet workspace in Chandigarh, a reliable internet connection, and the drive to keep response quality consistently high. Let me know about your past call-center experience, the tools you have used, and your expected start date so we can get the first batch of calls rolling this week.
